authors_text: Olivia Wiles,Joao Carreira,Iain Barr,Andrew Zisserman,Mateusz Malinowski
title: Compressed Vision for Efficient Video Understanding
title_zh: 压缩视觉以实现高效视频理解
abstract: Experience and reasoning occur across multiple temporal scales: milliseconds, seconds, hours or days. The vast majority of computer vision research, however, still focuses on individual images or short videos lasting only a few seconds. This is because handling longer videos require more scalable approaches even to process them. In this work, we propose a framework enabling research on hour-long videos with the same hardware that can now process second-long videos. We replace standard video compression, e.g. JPEG, with neural compression and show that we can directly feed compressed videos as inputs to regular video networks. Operating on compressed videos improves efficiency at all pipeline levels -- data transfer, speed and memory -- making it possible to train models faster and on much longer videos. Processing compressed signals has, however, the downside of precluding standard augmentation techniques if done naively. We address that by introducing a small network that can apply transformations to latent codes corresponding to commonly used augmentations in the original video space. We demonstrate that with our compressed vision pipeline, we can train video models more efficiently on popular benchmarks such as Kinetics600 and COIN. We also perform proof-of-concept experiments with new tasks defined over hour-long videos at standard frame rates. Processing such long videos is impossible without using compressed representation.
summary: Experience and reasoning occur across multiple temporal scales: milliseconds, seconds, hours or days. The vast majority of computer vision research, however, still focuses on individual images or short videos lasting only a few seconds. This is because handling longer videos require more scalable approaches even to process them. In this work, we propose a framework enabling research on hour-long videos with the same hardware that can now process second-long videos. We replace standard video compression, e.g. JPEG, with neural compression and show that we can directly feed compressed videos as inputs to regular video networks. Operating on compressed videos improves efficiency at all pipeline levels -- data transfer, speed and memory -- making it possible to train models faster and on much longer videos. Processing compressed signals has, however, the downside of precluding standard augmentation techniques if done naively. We address that by introducing a small network that can apply transformations to latent codes corresponding to commonly used augmentations in the original video space. We demonstrate that with our compressed vision pipeline, we can train video models more efficiently on popular benchmarks such as Kinetics600 and COIN. We also perform proof-of-concept experiments with new tasks defined over hour-long videos at standard frame rates. Processing such long videos is impossible without using compressed representation.
abstract_zh: 经验和推理发生在多个时间尺度上：毫秒、秒、小时或天。然而，绝大多数计算机视觉研究仍然关注单个图像或仅持续几秒钟的短视频。这是因为处理较长的视频需要更具可扩展性的方法来处理它们。在这项工作中，我们提出了一个框架，可以使用现在可以处理秒长视频的相同硬件来研究长达一小时的视频。我们替换标准视频压缩，例如JPEG，具有神经压缩，表明我们可以直接将压缩视频作为常规视频网络的输入。对压缩视频进行操作可提高所有管道级别的效率（数据传输、速度和内存），从而可以更快地在更长的视频上训练模型。然而，如果简单地处理压缩信号，则存在排除标准增强技术的缺点。我们通过引入一个小型网络来解决这个问题，该网络可以将转换应用于与原始视频空间中常用的增强相对应的潜在代码。我们证明，通过压缩视觉管道，我们可以在 Kinetics600 和 COIN 等流行基准上更有效地训练视频模型。我们还对以标准帧速率长达一小时的视频定义的新任务进行概念验证实验。如果不使用压缩表示，处理这么长的视频是不可能的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于神经压缩的框架，实现对长达数小时视频的高效处理与理解。
AI.motivation: 现有计算机视觉研究多聚焦于单张图像或几秒短视频，难以处理更长视频因计算资源限制。
AI.method: 用神经压缩替代传统视频压缩（如JPEG），直接输入压缩视频至常规网络，并设计小网络实现压缩域数据增强。
AI.result: 在Kinetics600和COIN等基准上验证效率提升，成功处理标准帧率下的小时级长视频任务。
AI.conclusion: 神经压缩框架显著提升视频处理效率，为长时序视频分析提供可行解决方案。

result: 在Kinetics600和COIN等基准上验证效率提升，成功处理标准帧率下的小时级长视频任务。
conclusion: 神经压缩框架显著提升视频处理效率，为长时序视频分析提供可行解决方案。
search_text: Compressed Vision for Efficient Video Understanding 压缩视觉以实现高效视频理解 Experience and reasoning occur across multiple temporal scales: milliseconds, seconds, hours or days. The vast majority of computer vision research, however, still focuses on individual images or short videos lasting only a few seconds. This is because handling longer videos require more scalable approaches even to process them. In this work, we propose a framework enabling research on hour-long videos with the same hardware that can now process second-long videos. We replace standard video compression, e.g. JPEG, with neural compression and show that we can directly feed compressed videos as inputs to regular video networks. Operating on compressed videos improves efficiency at all pipeline levels -- data transfer, speed and memory -- making it possible to train models faster and on much longer videos. Processing compressed signals has, however, the downside of precluding standard augmentation techniques if done naively. We address that by introducing a small network that can apply transformations to latent codes corresponding to commonly used augmentations in the original video space. We demonstrate that with our compressed vision pipeline, we can train video models more efficiently on popular benchmarks such as Kinetics600 and COIN. We also perform proof-of-concept experiments with new tasks defined over hour-long videos at standard frame rates. Processing such long videos is impossible without using compressed representation. 经验和推理发生在多个时间尺度上：毫秒、秒、小时或天。然而，绝大多数计算机视觉研究仍然关注单个图像或仅持续几秒钟的短视频。这是因为处理较长的视频需要更具可扩展性的方法来处理它们。在这项工作中，我们提出了一个框架，可以使用现在可以处理秒长视频的相同硬件来研究长达一小时的视频。我们替换标准视频压缩，例如JPEG，具有神经压缩，表明我们可以直接将压缩视频作为常规视频网络的输入。对压缩视频进行操作可提高所有管道级别的效率（数据传输、速度和内存），从而可以更快地在更长的视频上训练模型。然而，如果简单地处理压缩信号，则存在排除标准增强技术的缺点。我们通过引入一个小型网络来解决这个问题，该网络可以将转换应用于与原始视频空间中常用的增强相对应的潜在代码。我们证明，通过压缩视觉管道，我们可以在 Kinetics600 和 COIN 等流行基准上更有效地训练视频模型。我们还对以标准帧速率长达一小时的视频定义的新任务进行概念验证实验。如果不使用压缩表示，处理这么长的视频是不可能的。 本文提出一种基于神经压缩的框架，实现对长达数小时视频的高效处理与理解。 Olivia Wiles,Joao Carreira,Iain Barr,Andrew Zisserman,Mateusz Malinowski cs.CV

authors_text: Colin M. Gray,Shruthi Sai Chivukula,Thomas Carlock,Ziqing Li,Ja-Nae Duane
title: Scaffolding Ethics-Focused Methods for Practice Resonance
title_zh: 为实践共鸣搭建以道德为中心的方法
abstract: Numerous methods and tools have been proposed to motivate or support ethical awareness in design practice. However, many existing resources are not easily discoverable by practitioners. One reason being that they are framed using language that is not immediately accessible or resonant with the felt complexity of everyday practice. In this paper, we propose a set of empirically-supported "intentions" to frame practitioners' selection of relevant ethics-focused methods based on interviews with practitioners from a range of technology and design professions, and then leverage these intentions in the design and iterative evaluation of a website that allows practitioners to identify supports for ethics-focused action in their work context. Building on these findings, we propose a set of heuristics to evaluate the practice resonance of resources to support ethics-focused practice, laying the groundwork for increased ecological resonance of ethics-focused methods and method selection tools.
summary: Numerous methods and tools have been proposed to motivate or support ethical awareness in design practice. However, many existing resources are not easily discoverable by practitioners. One reason being that they are framed using language that is not immediately accessible or resonant with the felt complexity of everyday practice. In this paper, we propose a set of empirically-supported "intentions" to frame practitioners' selection of relevant ethics-focused methods based on interviews with practitioners from a range of technology and design professions, and then leverage these intentions in the design and iterative evaluation of a website that allows practitioners to identify supports for ethics-focused action in their work context. Building on these findings, we propose a set of heuristics to evaluate the practice resonance of resources to support ethics-focused practice, laying the groundwork for increased ecological resonance of ethics-focused methods and method selection tools.
abstract_zh: 人们提出了许多方法和工具来激发或支持设计实践中的道德意识。然而，许多现有资源并不容易被从业者发现。原因之一是它们使用的语言无法立即理解或与日常实践的复杂性产生共鸣。在本文中，我们提出了一组经验支持的“意图”，根据对一系列技术和设计专业从业者的访谈，框架从业者选择相关的以道德为中心的方法，然后在网站的设计和迭代评估中利用这些意图，使从业者能够在其工作环境中确定对以道德为中心的行动的支持。基于这些发现，我们提出了一套启发式方法来评估资源的实践共鸣，以支持以伦理为中心的实践，为增加以伦理为中心的方法和方法选择工具的生态共鸣奠定基础。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在构建一套基于实证的伦理实践框架，帮助从业者更有效地选择和应用伦理方法，并开发支持工具以增强伦理实践的生态共鸣。
AI.motivation: 现有伦理方法和工具因表述方式与从业者日常实践的复杂性脱节，导致难以被发现和应用，需更贴近实践需求的解决方案。
AI.method: 通过跨领域从业者访谈提炼核心‘意图’，基于意图设计并迭代评估伦理支持工具网站，提出评估资源实践共鸣的启发式方法。
AI.result: 开发了支持从业者识别伦理行动资源的网站，提出评估伦理方法生态适应性的启发式准则，为提升伦理工具实用性奠定基础。
AI.conclusion: 通过意图驱动的框架设计和共鸣评估方法，可有效弥合伦理理论与实践需求间的鸿沟，推动更契合实际场景的伦理工具开发。

authors_text: Kenan Morani
title: COVID-19 Detection Using Segmentation, Region Extraction and Classification Pipeline
title_zh: 使用分割、区域提取和分类管道进行 COVID-19 检测
abstract: The main purpose of this study is to develop a pipeline for COVID-19 detection from a big and challenging database of Computed Tomography (CT) images. The proposed pipeline includes a segmentation part, a lung extraction part, and a classifier part. Optional slice removal techniques after UNet-based segmentation of slices were also tried. The methodologies tried in the segmentation part are traditional segmentation methods as well as UNet-based methods. In the classification part, a Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) was used to take the final diagnosis decisions. In terms of the results: in the segmentation part, the proposed segmentation methods show high dice scores on a publicly available dataset. In the classification part, the results were compared at slice-level and at patient-level as well. At slice-level, methods were compared and showed high validation accuracy indicating efficiency in predicting 2D slices. At patient level, the proposed methods were also compared in terms of validation accuracy and macro F1 score on the validation set. The dataset used for classification is COV-19CT Database. The method proposed here showed improvement from our precious results on the same dataset. In Conclusion, the improved work in this paper has potential clinical usages for COVID-19 detection and diagnosis via CT images. The code is on github at https://github.com/IDU-CVLab/COV19D_3rd
summary: The main purpose of this study is to develop a pipeline for COVID-19 detection from a big and challenging database of Computed Tomography (CT) images. The proposed pipeline includes a segmentation part, a lung extraction part, and a classifier part. Optional slice removal techniques after UNet-based segmentation of slices were also tried. The methodologies tried in the segmentation part are traditional segmentation methods as well as UNet-based methods. In terms of the results: in the segmentation part, the proposed segmentation methods show high dice scores on a publicly available dataset. In the classification part, the results were compared at slice-level and at patient-level as well. At slice-level, methods were compared and showed high validation accuracy indicating efficiency in predicting 2D slices. At patient level, the proposed methods were also compared in terms of validation accuracy and macro F1 score on the validation set. The dataset used for classification is COV-19CT Database. In Conclusion, the improved work in this paper has potential clinical usages for COVID-19 detection and diagnosis via CT images. The code is on github at https://github.com/IDU-CVLab/COV19D_3rd
abstract_zh: 本研究的主要目的是开发一个从大型且具有挑战性的计算机断层扫描 (CT) 图像数据库中检测 COVID-19 的管道。所提出的流程包括分割部分、肺部提取部分和分类器部分。还尝试了基于 UNet 的切片分割后的可选切片去除技术。分割部分尝试的方法是传统的分割方法以及基于UNet的方法。在分类部分，使用卷积神经网络（CNN）做出最终的诊断决策。就结果而言：在分割部分，所提出的分割方法在公开数据集上显示出较高的骰子分数。在分类部分，还对切片级别和患者级别的结果进行了比较。在切片级别，对方法进行了比较，显示出较高的验证准确性，表明预测 2D 切片的效率。在患者层面，还对所提出的方法在验证集上的验证准确性和宏观 F1 分数方面进行了比较。用于分类的数据集是COV-19CT数据库。这里提出的方法显示了我们在同一数据集上的宝贵结果的改进。总之，本文改进的工作对于通过 CT 图像检测和诊断 COVID-19 具有潜在的临床用途。代码位于 github 上：https://github.com/IDU-CVLab/COV19D_3rd

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于CT图像的COVID-19检测流水线，包含分割、肺部区域提取和分类三个部分。
AI.motivation: 开发高效准确的CT图像分析方法以提升COVID-19检测效率，应对大规模数据集的挑战。
AI.method: 结合传统分割方法与UNet模型进行图像分割，通过肺部区域提取后使用卷积神经网络（CNN）进行分类，并尝试了分割后的切片去除技术。
AI.result: 分割部分在公开数据集上取得高Dice系数，分类部分在切片级和患者级均表现出高验证准确率及宏观F1分数，优于先前结果。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在临床中具有潜在应用价值，可辅助CT图像下的COVID-19诊断，代码已开源。

authors_text: Yuanbin Wang,Leyan Zhu,Shaofei Huang,Tianrui Hui,Xiaojie Li,Fei Wang,Si Liu
title: Cross-Modality Domain Adaptation for Freespace Detection: A Simple yet Effective Baseline
title_zh: 用于自由空间检测的跨模态域适应：简单而有效的基线
abstract: As one of the fundamental functions of autonomous driving system, freespace detection aims at classifying each pixel of the image captured by the camera as drivable or non-drivable. Current works of freespace detection heavily rely on large amount of densely labeled training data for accuracy and robustness, which is time-consuming and laborious to collect and annotate. To the best of our knowledge, we are the first work to explore unsupervised domain adaptation for freespace detection to alleviate the data limitation problem with synthetic data. We develop a cross-modality domain adaptation framework which exploits both RGB images and surface normal maps generated from depth images. A Collaborative Cross Guidance (CCG) module is proposed to leverage the context information of one modality to guide the other modality in a cross manner, thus realizing inter-modality intra-domain complement. To better bridge the domain gap between source domain (synthetic data) and target domain (real-world data), we also propose a Selective Feature Alignment (SFA) module which only aligns the features of consistent foreground area between the two domains, thus realizing inter-domain intra-modality adaptation. Extensive experiments are conducted by adapting three different synthetic datasets to one real-world dataset for freespace detection respectively. Our method performs closely to fully supervised freespace detection methods (93.08 v.s. 97.50 F1 score) and outperforms other general unsupervised domain adaptation methods for semantic segmentation with large margins, which shows the promising potential of domain adaptation for freespace detection.

Current works of freespace detection heavily rely on large amount of densely labeled training data for accuracy and robustness, which is time-consuming and laborious to collect and annotate. To the best of our knowledge, we are the first work to explore unsupervised domain adaptation for freespace detection to alleviate the data limitation problem with synthetic data. We develop a cross-modality domain adaptation framework which exploits both RGB images and surface normal maps generated from depth images. A Collaborative Cross Guidance (CCG) module is proposed to leverage the context information of one modality to guide the other modality in a cross manner, thus realizing inter-modality intra-domain complement. To better bridge the domain gap between source domain (synthetic data) and target domain (real-world data), we also propose a Selective Feature Alignment (SFA) module which only aligns the features of consistent foreground area between the two domains, thus realizing inter-domain intra-modality adaptation. Extensive experiments are conducted by adapting three different synthetic datasets to one real-world dataset for freespace detection respectively. Our method performs closely to fully supervised freespace detection methods (93.08 v.s. 97.50 F1 score) and outperforms other general unsupervised domain adaptation methods for semantic segmentation with large margins, which shows the promising potential of domain adaptation for freespace detection.
abstract_zh: 作为自动驾驶系统的基本功能之一，自由空间检测旨在将摄像头捕获的图像的每个像素分类为可驾驶或不可驾驶。目前的自由空间检测工作严重依赖大量密集标记的训练数据来保证准确性和鲁棒性，而收集和注释既费时又费力。据我们所知，我们是第一个探索自由空间检测的无监督域适应以缓解合成数据的数据限制问题的工作。我们开发了一个跨模态域适应框架，该框架利用 RGB 图像和从深度图像生成的表面法线图。提出了一种协作交叉指导（CCG）模块，利用一种模态的上下文信息以交叉方式指导另一种模态，从而实现跨模态域内互补。为了更好地弥合源域（合成数据）和目标域（真实数据）之间的域差距，我们还提出了一种选择性特征对齐（SFA）模块，该模块仅对齐两个域之间一致前景区域的特征，从而实现域间模态自适应。通过将三个不同的合成数据集分别适应一个真实世界的数据集以进行自由空间检测，进行了大量的实验。我们的方法与完全监督的自由空间检测方法表现非常接近（93.08 vs 97.50 F1 分数），并且在语义分割方面优于其他通用的无监督域适应方法，这表明了域适应在自由空间检测方面的巨大潜力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种跨模态领域自适应框架，用于解决自动驾驶中的自由空间检测问题，通过合成数据减少对大量标注数据的依赖。
AI.motivation: 自由空间检测需要大量标注数据，而人工标注成本高。现有方法难以有效利用合成数据解决领域差异问题，因此需要探索无监督领域自适应方法。
AI.method: 提出跨模态领域自适应框架，结合RGB图像和深度图像生成的表面法线图，包含协作跨模态引导（CCG）模块和选择性特征对齐（SFA）模块，分别实现模态间和领域间特征对齐。
AI.result: 在三个合成数据集到真实数据集的实验中，方法达到93.08的F1分数（全监督方法为97.50），显著优于其他无监督领域自适应方法。
AI.conclusion: 跨模态领域自适应为自由空间检测提供了有效且实用的解决方案，证明了领域自适应在减少标注依赖方面的潜力。

authors_text: Shruthi Sai Chivukula,Colin M Gray
title: What Do I Need to Design for Co-Design? Supporting Co-design as a Designerly Practice
title_zh: 我需要为协同设计设计什么？支持协同设计作为设计师实践
abstract: Co-design practices have been used for decades to support participatory engagement in design work. However, despite a wide range of materials that describe the design and commitments of numerous co-design experiences, few descriptions of the knowledge that guides designers when creating these experiences exist. Thus, we ask: What kind of knowledge do designers need to design co-design experiences? What form(s) could intermediate-level knowledge for co-design take? To answer these questions, we adopted a co/auto-ethnographic and Research-through-Design approach to reflexively engage with our design decisions, outcomes, and challenges related to two virtual co-design workshops. We constructed a set of four multi-dimensional facets(Rhythms of Engagement, Material Engagement, Ludic Engagement, and Conceptual Achievement) and three roles (designer, researcher, facilitator) to consider when creating co-design experiences. We illustrate these facets and roles through examples, building new \textit{intermediate-level knowledge} to support future co-design research and design, framing co-design as a designerly practice.
summary: Co-design practices have been used for decades to support participatory engagement in design work. However, despite a wide range of materials that describe the design and commitments of numerous co-design experiences, few descriptions of the knowledge that guides designers when creating these experiences exist. Thus, we ask: What kind of knowledge do designers need to design co-design experiences? What form(s) could intermediate-level knowledge for co-design take? To answer these questions, we adopted a co/auto-ethnographic and Research-through-Design approach to reflexively engage with our design decisions, outcomes, and challenges related to two virtual co-design workshops. We constructed a set of four multi-dimensional facets(Rhythms of Engagement, Material Engagement, Ludic Engagement, and Conceptual Achievement) and three roles (designer, researcher, facilitator) to consider when creating co-design experiences. We illustrate these facets and roles through examples, building new \textit{intermediate-level knowledge} to support future co-design research and design, framing co-design as a designerly practice.
abstract_zh: 几十年来，协同设计实践一直被用来支持设计工作的参与。然而，尽管有各种各样的材料描述了众多协同设计体验的设计和承诺，但指导设计师创建这些体验的知识的描述却很少。因此，我们要问：设计师需要什么样的知识来设计协同设计体验？协同设计的中级知识可以采取什么形式？为了回答这些问题，我们采用了协同/自动人种学和通过设计进行研究的方法，以反射性地参与与两个虚拟协同设计研讨会相关的设计决策、结果和挑战。我们构建了一组在创建协同设计体验时要考虑的四个多维方面（参与节奏、物质参与、游戏参与和概念成就）和三个角色（设计师、研究员、促进者）。我们通过示例来说明这些方面和角色，构建新的\textit{中级知识}来支持未来的协同设计研究和设计，将协同设计作为一种设计师实践。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨设计师在创建协同设计体验时所需的知识，并构建多维框架与角色模型以支持未来协同设计研究与实践。
AI.motivation: 尽管协同设计实践广泛应用，但缺乏系统描述指导设计师创建这些体验的中间层次知识，需填补此空白以支持未来研究与设计。
AI.method: 采用协同/自我民族志与研究通过设计方法，通过反思性参与两个虚拟协同设计研讨会的设计决策、成果与挑战进行分析。
AI.result: 构建了四个多维方面（参与节奏、材料参与、游戏化参与、概念成就）及三个角色（设计师、研究者、协调者），形成新的中间层次知识框架。
AI.conclusion: 将协同设计定位为设计实践，强调多维框架与角色模型对设计决策的支持，为未来协同设计研究与实践提供理论指导。

authors_text: Nate Gruver,Marc Finzi,Micah Goldblum,Andrew Gordon Wilson
title: The Lie Derivative for Measuring Learned Equivariance
title_zh: 用于测量习得等方差的李导数
abstract: Equivariance guarantees that a model's predictions capture key symmetries in data. When an image is translated or rotated, an equivariant model's representation of that image will translate or rotate accordingly. The success of convolutional neural networks has historically been tied to translation equivariance directly encoded in their architecture. The rising success of vision transformers, which have no explicit architectural bias towards equivariance, challenges this narrative and suggests that augmentations and training data might also play a significant role in their performance. In order to better understand the role of equivariance in recent vision models, we introduce the Lie derivative, a method for measuring equivariance with strong mathematical foundations and minimal hyperparameters. Using the Lie derivative, we study the equivariance properties of hundreds of pretrained models, spanning CNNs, transformers, and Mixer architectures. The scale of our analysis allows us to separate the impact of architecture from other factors like model size or training method. Surprisingly, we find that many violations of equivariance can be linked to spatial aliasing in ubiquitous network layers, such as pointwise non-linearities, and that as models get larger and more accurate they tend to display more equivariance, regardless of architecture. For example, transformers can be more equivariant than convolutional neural networks after training.
summary: Equivariance guarantees that a model's predictions capture key symmetries in data. When an image is translated or rotated, an equivariant model's representation of that image will translate or rotate accordingly. The success of convolutional neural networks has historically been tied to translation equivariance directly encoded in their architecture. In order to better understand the role of equivariance in recent vision models, we introduce the Lie derivative, a method for measuring equivariance with strong mathematical foundations and minimal hyperparameters. Using the Lie derivative, we study the equivariance properties of hundreds of pretrained models, spanning CNNs, transformers, and Mixer architectures. The scale of our analysis allows us to separate the impact of architecture from other factors like model size or training method. Surprisingly, we find that many violations of equivariance can be linked to spatial aliasing in ubiquitous network layers, such as pointwise non-linearities, and that as models get larger and more accurate they tend to display more equivariance, regardless of architecture. For example, transformers can be more equivariant than convolutional neural networks after training.
abstract_zh: 等方差保证模型的预测捕获数据中的关键对称性。当图像平移或旋转时，该图像的等变模型表示将相应地平移或旋转。卷积神经网络的成功历来与直接编码在其架构中的平移等方差紧密相关。视觉变换器的日益成功，对等方差没有明显的架构偏见，挑战了这种说法，并表明增强和训练数据也可能在其性能中发挥重要作用。为了更好地理解等方差在最新视觉模型中的作用，我们引入了李导数，这是一种具有强大数学基础和最小超参数的测量等方差的方法。使用李导数，我们研究了数百个预训练模型的等方差特性，涵盖 CNN、Transformer 和 Mixer 架构。我们分析的规模使我们能够将架构的影响与模型大小或训练方法等其他因素分开。令人惊讶的是，我们发现许多违反等方差的情况可能与普遍存在的网络层中的空间混叠有关，例如逐点非线性，并且随着模型变得更大、更准确，无论架构如何，它们往往会表现出更多的等方差。例如，训练后，Transformer 可以比卷积神经网络更加等变。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于李导数的方法来量化深度学习模型的等变性，分析了不同架构模型的等变特性。
AI.motivation: 卷积神经网络的等变性依赖于其架构设计，而视觉Transformer等无显式等变性偏置的模型却表现出色，需探究等变性在模型性能中的作用。
AI.method: 引入数学基础扎实且超参数少的李导数方法，对数百个预训练模型（包括CNN、Transformer和Mixer）进行等变性测量。
AI.result: 发现点wise非线性层中的空间混叠导致等变性破坏，且模型规模越大等变性越强，Transformer在训练后可能比CNN更等变。
AI.conclusion: 等变性对模型性能有重要影响，模型规模和训练数据的作用可能超越架构设计，大模型可通过训练实现更强等变性。

search_text: The Lie Derivative for Measuring Learned Equivariance 用于测量习得等方差的李导数 Equivariance guarantees that a model's predictions capture key symmetries in data. When an image is translated or rotated, an equivariant model's representation of that image will translate or rotate accordingly. The success of convolutional neural networks has historically been tied to translation equivariance directly encoded in their architecture. The rising success of vision transformers, which have no explicit architectural bias towards equivariance, challenges this narrative and suggests that augmentations and training data might also play a significant role in their performance. In order to better understand the role of equivariance in recent vision models, we introduce the Lie derivative, a method for measuring equivariance with strong mathematical foundations and minimal hyperparameters. Using the Lie derivative, we study the equivariance properties of hundreds of pretrained models, spanning CNNs, transformers, and Mixer architectures. The scale of our analysis allows us to separate the impact of architecture from other factors like model size or training method. Surprisingly, we find that many violations of equivariance can be linked to spatial aliasing in ubiquitous network layers, such as pointwise non-linearities, and that as models get larger and more accurate they tend to display more equivariance, regardless of architecture. For example, transformers can be more equivariant than convolutional neural networks after training. 等方差保证模型的预测捕获数据中的关键对称性。当图像平移或旋转时，该图像的等变模型表示将相应地平移或旋转。卷积神经网络的成功历来与直接编码在其架构中的平移等方差紧密相关。视觉变换器的日益成功，对等方差没有明显的架构偏见，挑战了这种说法，并表明增强和训练数据也可能在其性能中发挥重要作用。为了更好地理解等方差在最新视觉模型中的作用，我们引入了李导数，这是一种具有强大数学基础和最小超参数的测量等方差的方法。使用李导数，我们研究了数百个预训练模型的等方差特性，涵盖 CNN、Transformer 和 Mixer 架构。我们分析的规模使我们能够将架构的影响与模型大小或训练方法等其他因素分开。令人惊讶的是，我们发现许多违反等方差的情况可能与普遍存在的网络层中的空间混叠有关，例如逐点非线性，并且随着模型变得更大、更准确，无论架构如何，它们往往会表现出更多的等方差。例如，训练后，Transformer 可以比卷积神经网络更加等变。 本文提出了一种基于李导数的方法来量化深度学习模型的等变性，分析了不同架构模型的等变特性。 Nate Gruver,Marc Finzi,Micah Goldblum,Andrew Gordon Wilson cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CV,stat.ML

authors_text: Marcos R. Fernandes,Giorgio M. Magalhães,Yusef Cáceres,João B. R. do Val
title: GNSS/MEMS-INS Integration for Drone Navigation using EKF on Lie Groups
title_zh: 使用李群上的 EKF 进行无人机导航的 GNSS/MEMS-INS 集成
abstract: Building upon the theory of Kalman Filtering on Lie Groups, this paper describes an Extended Kalman Filter and Smoother for Loosely Coupled Integration of GNSS/INS tailored for post-processing applications. The approach employs a dynamic model on a matrix Lie Group that aggregates position, velocity, attitude, and the IMU biases as a single element of a Lie group. The development was motivated by a drone-borne Differential Interferometric SAR (DinSAR) application, which requires high-precision navigation information for short-flight missions using low-cost MEMS sensors. The filter and the Rauch-Tung-Striebel (RTS) smoother are both implemented and validated. The paper also presents a novel algorithm to initialize the heading value as an alternative to gyro-compassing or magnetometer-based alignments. The Mahalanobis Distance and the $χ^2$-test are employed during the filter update step to address the practical issue of outlier rejection for the GNSS measurements. The paper uses synthetic data to compare classic navigation schemes based on multiplicative quaternions and Euler angles. Finally, real data experiments demonstrate that the Kalman Filter based on Lie Groups performs better DinSAR processing than state-of-the-art commercial software.
summary: Building upon the theory of Kalman Filtering on Lie Groups, this paper describes an Extended Kalman Filter and Smoother for Loosely Coupled Integration of GNSS/INS tailored for post-processing applications. The approach employs a dynamic model on a matrix Lie Group that aggregates position, velocity, attitude, and the IMU biases as a single element of a Lie group. The development was motivated by a drone-borne Differential Interferometric SAR (DinSAR) application, which requires high-precision navigation information for short-flight missions using low-cost MEMS sensors. The filter and the Rauch-Tung-Striebel (RTS) smoother are both implemented and validated. The paper also presents a novel algorithm to initialize the heading value as an alternative to gyro-compassing or magnetometer-based alignments. The Mahalanobis Distance and the $χ^2$-test are employed during the filter update step to address the practical issue of outlier rejection for the GNSS measurements. The paper uses synthetic data to compare classic navigation schemes based on multiplicative quaternions and Euler angles. Finally, real data experiments demonstrate that the Kalman Filter based on Lie Groups performs better DinSAR processing than state-of-the-art commercial software.
abstract_zh: 基于李群上的卡尔曼滤波理论，本文描述了为后处理应用量身定制的用于 GNSS/INS 松耦合集成的扩展卡尔曼滤波器和平滑器。该方法在矩阵李群上采用动态模型，将位置、速度、姿态和 IMU 偏差聚合为李群的单个元素。该开发是由无人机载差分干涉 SAR (DinSAR) 应用推动的，该应用需要使用低成本 MEMS 传感器为短途飞行任务提供高精度导航信息。滤波器和 Rauch-Tung-Striebel (RTS) 平滑器均已实现并经过验证。该论文还提出了一种新颖的算法来初始化航向值，作为陀螺罗盘或基于磁力计的对准的替代方案。在滤波器更新步骤中采用马哈拉诺比斯距离和 $χ^2$ 测试来解决 GNSS 测量异常值拒绝的实际问题。本文使用合成数据来比较基于乘法四元数和欧拉角的经典导航方案。最后，真实数据实验表明，基于李群的卡尔曼滤波器比最先进的商业软件具有更好的 DinSAR 处理能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于李群的扩展卡尔曼滤波器（EKF）和滑动平滑器，用于无人机导航中的GNSS/MEMS-INS松耦合集成，以提高差分干涉合成孔径雷达（DinSAR）应用的导航精度。
AI.motivation: 无人机搭载的差分干涉合成孔径雷达（DinSAR）需要高精度导航信息，但低成本MEMS传感器存在误差，传统方法难以满足短航程任务的精度需求。
AI.method: 构建李群上的动态模型，将位置、速度、姿态及IMU偏差统一为李群元素，结合EKF与RTS平滑器，并引入马氏距离和χ²检验进行GNSS异常值剔除，提出无需陀螺罗盘或磁力计的航向初始化算法。
AI.result: 合成数据与实测实验表明，基于李群的滤波器在DinSAR处理中优于现有商业软件，验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 李群框架下的EKF为低成本无人机提供了高精度导航解决方案，适用于对导航精度要求严苛的DinSAR等应用场景。

authors_text: Lucas Costa Brito,Gian Antonio Susto,Jorge Nei Brito,Marcus Antonio Viana Duarte
title: Fault Diagnosis using eXplainable AI: a Transfer Learning-based Approach for Rotating Machinery exploiting Augmented Synthetic Data
title_zh: 使用 eXplainable AI 进行故障诊断：一种利用增强综合数据的基于迁移学习的旋转机械方法
abstract: Artificial Intelligence (AI) is one of the approaches that has been proposed to analyze the collected data (e.g., vibration signals) providing a diagnosis of the asset's operating condition. It is known that models trained with labeled data (supervised) achieve excellent results, but two main problems make their application in production processes difficult: (i) impossibility or long time to obtain a sample of all operational conditions (since faults seldom happen) and (ii) high cost of experts to label all acquired data. Another limitating factor for the applicability of AI approaches in this context is the lack of interpretability of the models (black-boxes), which reduces the confidence of the diagnosis and trust/adoption from users. To overcome these problems, a new generic and interpretable approach for classifying faults in rotating machinery based on transfer learning from augmented synthetic data to real rotating machinery is here proposed, namelly FaultD-XAI (Fault Diagnosis using eXplainable AI). To provide scalability using transfer learning, synthetic vibration signals are created mimicking the characteristic behavior of failures in operation. The application of Gradient-weighted Class Activation Mapping (Grad-CAM) with 1D Convolutional Neural Network (1D CNN) allows the interpretation of results, supporting the user in decision making and increasing diagnostic confidence. The proposed approach not only obtained promising diagnostic performance, but was also able to learn characteristics used by experts to identify conditions in a source domain and apply them in another target domain. The experimental results suggest a promising approach on exploiting transfer learning, synthetic data and explainable artificial intelligence for fault diagnosis. Lastly, to guarantee reproducibility and foster research in the field, the developed dataset is made publicly available.

The application of Gradient-weighted Class Activation Mapping (Grad-CAM) with 1D Convolutional Neural Network (1D CNN) allows the interpretation of results, supporting the user in decision making and increasing diagnostic confidence. The proposed approach not only obtained promising diagnostic performance, but was also able to learn characteristics used by experts to identify conditions in a source domain and apply them in another target domain. The experimental results suggest a promising approach on exploiting transfer learning, synthetic data and explainable artificial intelligence for fault diagnosis. Lastly, to guarantee reproducibility and foster research in the field, the developed dataset is made publicly available.
abstract_zh: 人工智能 (AI) 是分析收集的数据（例如振动信号）以诊断资产运行状况的方法之一。众所周知，使用标记数据（监督）训练的模型取得了优异的结果，但有两个主要问题使其在生产过程中的应用变得困难：（i）不可能或需要很长时间才能获得所有操作条件的样本（因为故障很少发生）和（ii）专家标记所有获取的数据的成本很高。在这种情况下人工智能方法的适用性的另一个限制因素是模型（黑匣子）缺乏可解释性，这降低了用户诊断和信任/采用的信心。为了克服这些问题，本文提出了一种新的通用且可解释的方法，用于基于从增强合成数据到真实旋转机械的迁移学习对旋转机械中的故障进行分类，即FaultD-XAI（使用可解释人工智能的故障诊断）。为了使用迁移学习提供可扩展性，模拟运行故障的特征行为来创建合成振动信号。梯度加权类激活映射 (Grad-CAM) 与一维卷积神经网络 (1D CNN) 的应用可以解释结果，支持用户决策并提高诊断信心。所提出的方法不仅获得了有希望的诊断性能，而且还能够学习专家用来识别源域中的条件并将其应用于另一个目标域的特征。实验结果提出了一种利用迁移学习、合成数据和可解释的人工智能进行故障诊断的有前途的方法。最后，为了保证可重复性并促进该领域的研究，开发的数据集是公开的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于可解释AI（XAI）和迁移学习的故障诊断方法FaultD-XAI，利用增强的合成数据对旋转机械进行故障分类。
AI.motivation: 传统监督学习模型在工业故障诊断中面临数据标注成本高、故障样本稀缺及模型可解释性差等问题，限制了其实际应用。
AI.method: 通过生成模拟故障特征的合成振动信号，结合迁移学习将源域知识迁移到目标域，并采用Grad-CAM与1D CNN实现结果可解释性。
AI.result: 方法在诊断性能上表现优异，成功实现了跨领域知识迁移，且公开了数据集以促进研究复现。
AI.conclusion: 融合迁移学习、合成数据与可解释AI为工业故障诊断提供了有效方案，同时推动了相关领域的研究进展。

search_text: Fault Diagnosis using eXplainable AI: a Transfer Learning-based Approach for Rotating Machinery exploiting Augmented Synthetic Data 使用 eXplainable AI 进行故障诊断：一种利用增强综合数据的基于迁移学习的旋转机械方法 Artificial Intelligence (AI) is one of the approaches that has been proposed to analyze the collected data (e.g., vibration signals) providing a diagnosis of the asset's operating condition. It is known that models trained with labeled data (supervised) achieve excellent results, but two main problems make their application in production processes difficult: (i) impossibility or long time to obtain a sample of all operational conditions (since faults seldom happen) and (ii) high cost of experts to label all acquired data. Another limitating factor for the applicability of AI approaches in this context is the lack of interpretability of the models (black-boxes), which reduces the confidence of the diagnosis and trust/adoption from users. To overcome these problems, a new generic and interpretable approach for classifying faults in rotating machinery based on transfer learning from augmented synthetic data to real rotating machinery is here proposed, namelly FaultD-XAI (Fault Diagnosis using eXplainable AI). To provide scalability using transfer learning, synthetic vibration signals are created mimicking the characteristic behavior of failures in operation. The application of Gradient-weighted Class Activation Mapping (Grad-CAM) with 1D Convolutional Neural Network (1D CNN) allows the interpretation of results, supporting the user in decision making and increasing diagnostic confidence. The proposed approach not only obtained promising diagnostic performance, but was also able to learn characteristics used by experts to identify conditions in a source domain and apply them in another target domain. The experimental results suggest a promising approach on exploiting transfer learning, synthetic data and explainable artificial intelligence for fault diagnosis. Lastly, to guarantee reproducibility and foster research in the field, the developed dataset is made publicly available. 人工智能 (AI) 是分析收集的数据（例如振动信号）以诊断资产运行状况的方法之一。众所周知，使用标记数据（监督）训练的模型取得了优异的结果，但有两个主要问题使其在生产过程中的应用变得困难：（i）不可能或需要很长时间才能获得所有操作条件的样本（因为故障很少发生）和（ii）专家标记所有获取的数据的成本很高。在这种情况下人工智能方法的适用性的另一个限制因素是模型（黑匣子）缺乏可解释性，这降低了用户诊断和信任/采用的信心。为了克服这些问题，本文提出了一种新的通用且可解释的方法，用于基于从增强合成数据到真实旋转机械的迁移学习对旋转机械中的故障进行分类，即FaultD-XAI（使用可解释人工智能的故障诊断）。为了使用迁移学习提供可扩展性，模拟运行故障的特征行为来创建合成振动信号。梯度加权类激活映射 (Grad-CAM) 与一维卷积神经网络 (1D CNN) 的应用可以解释结果，支持用户决策并提高诊断信心。所提出的方法不仅获得了有希望的诊断性能，而且还能够学习专家用来识别源域中的条件并将其应用于另一个目标域的特征。实验结果提出了一种利用迁移学习、合成数据和可解释的人工智能进行故障诊断的有前途的方法。最后，为了保证可重复性并促进该领域的研究，开发的数据集是公开的。 本文提出了一种基于可解释AI（XAI）和迁移学习的故障诊断方法FaultD-XAI，利用增强的合成数据对旋转机械进行故障分类。 Lucas Costa Brito,Gian Antonio Susto,Jorge Nei Brito,Marcus Antonio Viana Duarte cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Guilherme Siqueira Eduardo,Wouter Caarls
title: Designing a Robust Low-Level Agnostic Controller for a Quadrotor with Actor-Critic Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 使用 Actor-Critic 强化学习为四旋翼飞行器设计鲁棒的低级不可知控制器
abstract: Purpose: Real-life applications using quadrotors introduce a number of disturbances and time-varying properties that pose a challenge to flight controllers. We observed that, when a quadrotor is tasked with picking up and dropping a payload, traditional PID and RL-based controllers found in literature struggle to maintain flight after the vehicle changes its dynamics due to interaction with this external object. Methods: In this work, we introduce domain randomization during the training phase of a low-level waypoint guidance controller based on Soft Actor-Critic. The resulting controller is evaluated on the proposed payload pick up and drop task with added disturbances that emulate real-life operation of the vehicle. Results & Conclusion: We show that, by introducing a certain degree of uncertainty in quadrotor dynamics during training, we can obtain a controller that is capable to perform the proposed task using a larger variation of quadrotor parameters. Additionally, the RL-based controller outperforms a traditional positional PID controller with optimized gains in this task, while remaining agnostic to different simulation parameters.
summary: Purpose: Real-life applications using quadrotors introduce a number of disturbances and time-varying properties that pose a challenge to flight controllers. We observed that, when a quadrotor is tasked with picking up and dropping a payload, traditional PID and RL-based controllers found in literature struggle to maintain flight after the vehicle changes its dynamics due to interaction with this external object. Methods: In this work, we introduce domain randomization during the training phase of a low-level waypoint guidance controller based on Soft Actor-Critic. The resulting controller is evaluated on the proposed payload pick up and drop task with added disturbances that emulate real-life operation of the vehicle. Results & Conclusion: We show that, by introducing a certain degree of uncertainty in quadrotor dynamics during training, we can obtain a controller that is capable to perform the proposed task using a larger variation of quadrotor parameters. Additionally, the RL-based controller outperforms a traditional positional PID controller with optimized gains in this task, while remaining agnostic to different simulation parameters.
abstract_zh: 目的：使用四旋翼飞行器的实际应用会引入许多干扰和时变特性，这对飞行控制器构成了挑战。我们观察到，当四旋翼飞行器的任务是拾取和投放有效负载时，文献中发现的传统 PID 和 RL 控制器在飞行器由于与外部物体的相互作用而改变其动力学后难以维持飞行。方法：在这项工作中，我们在基于 Soft Actor-Critic 的低级航点引导控制器的训练阶段引入了域随机化。最终的控制器根据建议的有效负载拾取和投放任务进行评估，并添加模拟车辆实际操作的干扰。结果与结论：我们表明，通过在训练过程中在四旋翼飞行器动力学中引入一定程度的不确定性，我们可以获得能够使用较大变化的四旋翼飞行器参数来执行所提出的任务的控制器。此外，基于 RL 的控制器优于传统位置 PID 控制器，在此任务中具有优化的增益，同时保持对不同仿真参数的不可知性。

AI.tldr: 本文设计了一种基于软演员评论家强化学习的鲁棒低级无偏控制器，用于四旋翼无人机在携带负载任务中的飞行控制。
AI.motivation: 传统PID和基于强化学习的控制器在四旋翼无人机与外部物体交互导致动力学变化时难以维持飞行稳定性，特别是在负载拾取和投放任务中表现不足。
AI.method: 在训练低级航路点引导控制器时引入领域随机化技术，采用软演员评论家（Soft Actor-Critic）算法提升控制器鲁棒性。
AI.result: 实验表明，该控制器在面对动力学不确定性时能适应更广泛的四旋翼参数，并在负载任务中优于优化增益的传统PID控制器。
AI.conclusion: 通过训练阶段的动力学不确定性引入，所提出的强化学习控制器实现了对不同仿真参数的鲁棒性，有效解决了负载任务中的控制难题。

authors_text: Andrea Falanti,Eugenio Lomurno,Stefano Samele,Danilo Ardagna,Matteo Matteucci
title: POPNASv2: An Efficient Multi-Objective Neural Architecture Search Technique
title_zh: POPNASv2：一种高效的多目标神经架构搜索技术
abstract: Automating the research for the best neural network model is a task that has gained more and more relevance in the last few years. In this context, Neural Architecture Search (NAS) represents the most effective technique whose results rival the state of the art hand-crafted architectures. However, this approach requires a lot of computational capabilities as well as research time, which makes prohibitive its usage in many real-world scenarios. With its sequential model-based optimization strategy, Progressive Neural Architecture Search (PNAS) represents a possible step forward to face this resources issue. Despite the quality of the found network architectures, this technique is still limited in research time. A significant step in this direction has been done by Pareto-Optimal Progressive Neural Architecture Search (POPNAS), which expands PNAS with a time predictor to enable a trade-off between search time and accuracy, considering a multi-objective optimization problem. This paper proposes a new version of the Pareto-Optimal Progressive Neural Architecture Search, called POPNASv2. Our approach enhances its first version and improves its performance. We expanded the search space by adding new operators and improved the quality of both predictors to build more accurate Pareto fronts. Moreover, we introduced cell equivalence checks and enriched the search strategy with an adaptive greedy exploration step. Our efforts allow POPNASv2 to achieve PNAS-like performance with an average 4x factor search time speed-up.
summary: Automating the research for the best neural network model is a task that has gained more and more relevance in the last few years. In this context, Neural Architecture Search (NAS) represents the most effective technique whose results rival the state of the art hand-crafted architectures. However, this approach requires a lot of computational capabilities as well as research time, which makes prohibitive its usage in many real-world scenarios. With its sequential model-based optimization strategy, Progressive Neural Architecture Search (PNAS) represents a possible step forward to face this resources issue. Despite the quality of the found network architectures, this technique is still limited in research time. A significant step in this direction has been done by Pareto-Optimal Progressive Neural Architecture Search (POPNAS), which expands PNAS with a time predictor to enable a trade-off between search time and accuracy, considering a multi-objective optimization problem. This paper proposes a new version of the Pareto-Optimal Progressive Neural Architecture Search, called POPNASv2. Our approach enhances its first version and improves its performance. We expanded the search space by adding new operators and improved the quality of both predictors to build more accurate Pareto fronts. Moreover, we introduced cell equivalence checks and enriched the search strategy with an adaptive greedy exploration step. Our efforts allow POPNASv2 to achieve PNAS-like performance with an average 4x factor search time speed-up.
abstract_zh: 自动化最佳神经网络模型的研究是一项在过去几年中变得越来越重要的任务。在这种情况下，神经架构搜索（NAS）代表了最有效的技术，其结果可以与最先进的手工架构相媲美。然而，这种方法需要大量的计算能力和研究时间，这使得它在许多现实场景中的使用受到限制。凭借其基于序列模型的优化策略，渐进式神经架构搜索 (PNAS) 代表着解决这一资源问题的可能的一步。尽管所发现的网络架构质量很高，但该技术的研究时间仍然有限。帕累托最优渐进神经架构搜索 (POPNAS) 在这个方向上迈出了重要的一步，它使用时间预测器扩展了 PNAS，以在考虑多目标优化问题的情况下实现搜索时间和准确性之间的权衡。本文提出了帕累托最优渐进神经架构搜索的新版本，称为 POPNASv2。我们的方法增强了它的第一个版本并提高了它的性能。我们通过添加新的运算符来扩展搜索空间，并提高两个预测变量的质量，以构建更准确的帕累托前沿。此外，我们引入了单元等价检查，并通过自适应贪婪探索步骤丰富了搜索策略。我们的努力使 POPNASv2 能够实现类似 PNAS 的性能，搜索时间平均加速 4 倍。

AI.tldr: 本文提出POPNASv2方法，在保持网络性能的同时显著提升多目标神经网络架构搜索效率。
AI.motivation: 传统神经网络架构搜索(NAS)计算成本高昂且耗时，现有方法PNAS和POPNAS在搜索效率上仍有改进空间。
AI.method: 通过扩展搜索空间、优化预测模型、引入细胞等价性校验和自适应贪婪探索策略，改进多目标优化框架。
AI.result: 在保持与PNAS相当性能的前提下，平均搜索速度提升4倍，生成更精确的帕累托前沿。
AI.conclusion: POPNASv2有效平衡了搜索时间与准确性，为实际场景中的多目标神经架构搜索提供了可行方案。

search_text: POPNASv2: An Efficient Multi-Objective Neural Architecture Search Technique POPNASv2：一种高效的多目标神经架构搜索技术 Automating the research for the best neural network model is a task that has gained more and more relevance in the last few years. In this context, Neural Architecture Search (NAS) represents the most effective technique whose results rival the state of the art hand-crafted architectures. However, this approach requires a lot of computational capabilities as well as research time, which makes prohibitive its usage in many real-world scenarios. With its sequential model-based optimization strategy, Progressive Neural Architecture Search (PNAS) represents a possible step forward to face this resources issue. Despite the quality of the found network architectures, this technique is still limited in research time. A significant step in this direction has been done by Pareto-Optimal Progressive Neural Architecture Search (POPNAS), which expands PNAS with a time predictor to enable a trade-off between search time and accuracy, considering a multi-objective optimization problem. This paper proposes a new version of the Pareto-Optimal Progressive Neural Architecture Search, called POPNASv2. Our approach enhances its first version and improves its performance. We expanded the search space by adding new operators and improved the quality of both predictors to build more accurate Pareto fronts. Moreover, we introduced cell equivalence checks and enriched the search strategy with an adaptive greedy exploration step. Our efforts allow POPNASv2 to achieve PNAS-like performance with an average 4x factor search time speed-up. 自动化最佳神经网络模型的研究是一项在过去几年中变得越来越重要的任务。在这种情况下，神经架构搜索（NAS）代表了最有效的技术，其结果可以与最先进的手工架构相媲美。然而，这种方法需要大量的计算能力和研究时间，这使得它在许多现实场景中的使用受到限制。凭借其基于序列模型的优化策略，渐进式神经架构搜索 (PNAS) 代表着解决这一资源问题的可能的一步。尽管所发现的网络架构质量很高，但该技术的研究时间仍然有限。帕累托最优渐进神经架构搜索 (POPNAS) 在这个方向上迈出了重要的一步，它使用时间预测器扩展了 PNAS，以在考虑多目标优化问题的情况下实现搜索时间和准确性之间的权衡。本文提出了帕累托最优渐进神经架构搜索的新版本，称为 POPNASv2。我们的方法增强了它的第一个版本并提高了它的性能。我们通过添加新的运算符来扩展搜索空间，并提高两个预测变量的质量，以构建更准确的帕累托前沿。此外，我们引入了单元等价检查，并通过自适应贪婪探索步骤丰富了搜索策略。我们的努力使 POPNASv2 能够实现类似 PNAS 的性能，搜索时间平均加速 4 倍。 本文提出POPNASv2方法，在保持网络性能的同时显著提升多目标神经网络架构搜索效率。 Andrea Falanti,Eugenio Lomurno,Stefano Samele,Danilo Ardagna,Matteo Matteucci cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Ji Jiang,Meng Cao,Tengtao Song,Yuexian Zou
title: Video Referring Expression Comprehension via Transformer with Content-aware Query
title_zh: 通过带有内容感知查询的 Transformer 进行视频引用表达理解
abstract: Video Referring Expression Comprehension (REC) aims to localize a target object in video frames referred by the natural language expression. Recently, the Transformerbased methods have greatly boosted the performance limit. However, we argue that the current query design is suboptima and suffers from two drawbacks: 1) the slow training convergence process; 2) the lack of fine-grained alignment. To alleviate this, we aim to couple the pure learnable queries with the content information. Specifically, we set up a fixed number of learnable bounding boxes across the frame and the aligned region features are employed to provide fruitful clues. Besides, we explicitly link certain phrases in the sentence to the semantically relevant visual areas. To this end, we introduce two new datasets (i.e., VID-Entity and VidSTG-Entity) by augmenting the VIDSentence and VidSTG datasets with the explicitly referred words in the whole sentence, respectively. Benefiting from this, we conduct the fine-grained cross-modal alignment at the region-phrase level, which ensures more detailed feature representations. Incorporating these two designs, our proposed model (dubbed as ContFormer) achieves the state-of-the-art performance on widely benchmarked datasets. For example on VID-Entity dataset, compared to the previous SOTA, ContFormer achieves 8.75% absolute improvement on Accu.@0.6.
summary: Video Referring Expression Comprehension (REC) aims to localize a target object in video frames referred by the natural language expression. Recently, the Transformerbased methods have greatly boosted the performance limit. However, we argue that the current query design is suboptima and suffers from two drawbacks: 1) the slow training convergence process; 2) the lack of fine-grained alignment. To alleviate this, we aim to couple the pure learnable queries with the content information. Specifically, we set up a fixed number of learnable bounding boxes across the frame and the aligned region features are employed to provide fruitful clues. Besides, we explicitly link certain phrases in the sentence to the semantically relevant visual areas. To this end, we introduce two new datasets (i.e., VID-Entity and VidSTG-Entity) by augmenting the VIDSentence and VidSTG datasets with the explicitly referred words in the whole sentence, respectively. Benefiting from this, we conduct the fine-grained cross-modal alignment at the region-phrase level, which ensures more detailed feature representations. Incorporating these two designs, our proposed model (dubbed as ContFormer) achieves the state-of-the-art performance on widely benchmarked datasets. For example on VID-Entity dataset, compared to the previous SOTA, ContFormer achieves 8.75% absolute improvement on Accu.@0.6.
abstract_zh: 视频引用表达理解（REC）旨在定位自然语言表达所引用的视频帧中的目标对象。最近，基于 Transformer 的方法极大地提升了性能极限。然而，我们认为当前的查询设计不是最优的，并且存在两个缺点：1）训练收敛过程缓慢； 2）缺乏细粒度的对齐。为了缓解这个问题，我们的目标是将纯粹的可学习查询与内容信息结合起来。具体来说，我们在整个框架中设置了固定数量的可学习边界框，并利用对齐的区域特征来提供富有成效的线索。此外，我们明确地将句子中的某些短语链接到语义相关的视觉区域。为此，我们通过分别使用整个句子中明确引用的单词来扩充 VIDSentence 和 VidSTG 数据集，引入了两个新的数据集（即 VID-Entity 和 VidSTG-Entity）。受益于此，我们在区域短语级别进行细粒度的跨模态对齐，这确保了更详细的特征表示。结合这两种设计，我们提出的模型（称为 ContFormer）在广泛的基准数据集上实现了最先进的性能。例如，在 VID-Entity 数据集上，与之前的 SOTA 相比，ContFormer 在 Accu.@0.6 上实现了 8.75% 的绝对改进。

AI.tldr: 该论文提出一种基于Transformer的内容感知查询方法，用于视频指代表达理解任务，旨在通过改进查询设计提升模型性能。
AI.motivation: 现有Transformer方法在视频指代表达理解中存在训练收敛慢和细粒度对齐不足的问题，需结合内容信息优化查询设计。
AI.method: 设计固定数量的可学习边界框并结合对齐区域特征，引入显式语义关联的区域-短语级跨模态对齐，构建两个新数据集VID-Entity和VidSTG-Entity。
AI.result: 在VID-Entity数据集上，ContFormer模型相比之前最优方法实现8.75%的绝对准确率提升，达到当前最优性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过内容感知查询和细粒度对齐设计，提出的ContFormer模型有效解决了现有方法的局限性，在视频指代表达理解任务中取得显著进展。

authors_text: Songhao Han,Wei Huang,Xiaotian Luan
title: VLSNR:Vision-Linguistics Coordination Time Sequence-aware News Recommendation
title_zh: VLSNR：视觉语言协调时间序列感知新闻推荐
abstract: News representation and user-oriented modeling are both essential for news recommendation. Most existing methods are based on textual information but ignore the visual information and users' dynamic interests. However, compared to textual only content, multimodal semantics is beneficial for enhancing the comprehension of users' temporal and long-lasting interests. In our work, we propose a vision-linguistics coordinate time sequence news recommendation. Firstly, a pretrained multimodal encoder is applied to embed images and texts into the same feature space. Then the self-attention network is used to learn the chronological sequence. Additionally, an attentional GRU network is proposed to model user preference in terms of time adequately. Finally, the click history and user representation are embedded to calculate the ranking scores for candidate news. Furthermore, we also construct a large scale multimodal news recommendation dataset V-MIND. Experimental results show that our model outperforms baselines and achieves SOTA on our independently constructed dataset.
summary: News representation and user-oriented modeling are both essential for news recommendation. Most existing methods are based on textual information but ignore the visual information and users' dynamic interests. However, compared to textual only content, multimodal semantics is beneficial for enhancing the comprehension of users' temporal and long-lasting interests. In our work, we propose a vision-linguistics coordinate time sequence news recommendation. Firstly, a pretrained multimodal encoder is applied to embed images and texts into the same feature space. Then the self-attention network is used to learn the chronological sequence. Additionally, an attentional GRU network is proposed to model user preference in terms of time adequately. Finally, the click history and user representation are embedded to calculate the ranking scores for candidate news. Furthermore, we also construct a large scale multimodal news recommendation dataset V-MIND. Experimental results show that our model outperforms baselines and achieves SOTA on our independently constructed dataset.
abstract_zh: 新闻表示和面向用户的建模对于新闻推荐都是至关重要的。现有的方法大多基于文本信息，而忽略了视觉信息和用户的动态兴趣。然而，与纯文本内容相比，多模态语义有利于增强对用户暂时和长期兴趣的理解。在我们的工作中，我们提出了一种视觉语言学坐标时间序列新闻推荐。首先，应用预训练的多模态编码器将图像和文本嵌入到同一特征空间中。然后使用自注意力网络来学习时间顺序。此外，还提出了一种注意力 GRU 网络来充分根据时间对用户偏好进行建模。最后，嵌入点击历史记录和用户表示来计算候选新闻的排名分数。此外，我们还构建了一个大规模多模态新闻推荐数据集V-MIND。实验结果表明，我们的模型优于基线，并在我们独立构建的数据集上实现了 SOTA。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合视觉与语言信息并考虑时间序列的新闻推荐模型VLSNR，通过多模态特征融合和时序建模提升推荐效果。
AI.motivation: 现有新闻推荐方法过度依赖文本信息，忽视了视觉内容及用户动态兴趣的时序特性，而多模态信息能更全面刻画用户长期兴趣。
AI.method: 采用预训练多模态编码器对图文信息进行特征对齐，利用自注意力网络捕捉新闻内容时序关系，设计注意力GRU网络建模用户时序偏好，结合点击历史与用户表征计算候选新闻排序分数。
AI.result: 在自建大规模多模态数据集V-MIND上，VLSNR模型在多个指标上超越基线方法，达到当时最优性能。
AI.conclusion: 融合视觉语言多模态特征与时序建模能显著提升新闻推荐效果，所构建的V-MIND数据集为后续研究提供重要支撑。

search_text: VLSNR:Vision-Linguistics Coordination Time Sequence-aware News Recommendation VLSNR：视觉语言协调时间序列感知新闻推荐 News representation and user-oriented modeling are both essential for news recommendation. Most existing methods are based on textual information but ignore the visual information and users' dynamic interests. However, compared to textual only content, multimodal semantics is beneficial for enhancing the comprehension of users' temporal and long-lasting interests. In our work, we propose a vision-linguistics coordinate time sequence news recommendation. Firstly, a pretrained multimodal encoder is applied to embed images and texts into the same feature space. Then the self-attention network is used to learn the chronological sequence. Additionally, an attentional GRU network is proposed to model user preference in terms of time adequately. Finally, the click history and user representation are embedded to calculate the ranking scores for candidate news. Furthermore, we also construct a large scale multimodal news recommendation dataset V-MIND. Experimental results show that our model outperforms baselines and achieves SOTA on our independently constructed dataset. 新闻表示和面向用户的建模对于新闻推荐都是至关重要的。现有的方法大多基于文本信息，而忽略了视觉信息和用户的动态兴趣。然而，与纯文本内容相比，多模态语义有利于增强对用户暂时和长期兴趣的理解。在我们的工作中，我们提出了一种视觉语言学坐标时间序列新闻推荐。首先，应用预训练的多模态编码器将图像和文本嵌入到同一特征空间中。然后使用自注意力网络来学习时间顺序。此外，还提出了一种注意力 GRU 网络来充分根据时间对用户偏好进行建模。最后，嵌入点击历史记录和用户表示来计算候选新闻的排名分数。此外，我们还构建了一个大规模多模态新闻推荐数据集V-MIND。实验结果表明，我们的模型优于基线，并在我们独立构建的数据集上实现了 SOTA。 本文提出一种结合视觉与语言信息并考虑时间序列的新闻推荐模型VLSNR，通过多模态特征融合和时序建模提升推荐效果。 Songhao Han,Wei Huang,Xiaotian Luan cs.IR,cs.AI,cs.LG,cs.MM

authors_text: Seonhyeong Kim,Jiheon Woo,Daewon Seo,Yongjune Kim
title: Communication-Efficient and Drift-Robust Federated Learning via Elastic Net
title_zh: 通过弹性网络进行高效通信且具有鲁棒性的联邦学习
abstract: Federated learning (FL) is a distributed method to train a global model over a set of local clients while keeping data localized. It reduces the risks of privacy and security but faces important challenges including expensive communication costs and client drift issues. To address these issues, we propose FedElasticNet, a communication-efficient and drift-robust FL framework leveraging the elastic net. It repurposes two types of the elastic net regularizers (i.e., $\ell_1$ and $\ell_2$ penalties on the local model updates): (1) the $\ell_1$-norm regularizer sparsifies the local updates to reduce the communication costs and (2) the $\ell_2$-norm regularizer resolves the client drift problem by limiting the impact of drifting local updates due to data heterogeneity. FedElasticNet is a general framework for FL; hence, without additional costs, it can be integrated into prior FL techniques, e.g., FedAvg, FedProx, SCAFFOLD, and FedDyn. We show that our framework effectively resolves the communication cost and client drift problems simultaneously.
summary: Federated learning (FL) is a distributed method to train a global model over a set of local clients while keeping data localized. It reduces the risks of privacy and security but faces important challenges including expensive communication costs and client drift issues. To address these issues, we propose FedElasticNet, a communication-efficient and drift-robust FL framework leveraging the elastic net. It repurposes two types of the elastic net regularizers (i.e., $\ell_1$ and $\ell_2$ penalties on the local model updates): (1) the $\ell_1$-norm regularizer sparsifies the local updates to reduce the communication costs and (2) the $\ell_2$-norm regularizer resolves the client drift problem by limiting the impact of drifting local updates due to data heterogeneity. FedElasticNet is a general framework for FL; hence, without additional costs, it can be integrated into prior FL techniques, e.g., FedAvg, FedProx, SCAFFOLD, and FedDyn. We show that our framework effectively resolves the communication cost and client drift problems simultaneously.
abstract_zh: 联邦学习 (FL) 是一种分布式方法，用于在一组本地客户端上训练全局模型，同时保持数据本地化。它降低了隐私和安全风险，但面临着重要挑战，包括昂贵的通信成本和客户漂移问题。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了 FedElasticNet，这是一种利用弹性网络的通信高效且漂移鲁棒的 FL 框架。它重新利用了两种类型的弹性网络正则化器（即本地模型更新的 $\ell_1$ 和 $\ell_2$ 惩罚）：（1）$\ell_1$-norm 正则化器稀疏本地更新以减少通信成本，（2）$\ell_2$-norm 正则化器通过限制由于数据异构性而导致的本地更新漂移的影响来解决客户端漂移问题。 FedElasticNet是FL的通用框架；因此，无需额外成本，它就可以集成到现有的 FL 技术中，例如 FedAvg、FedProx、SCAFFOLD 和 FedDyn。我们表明，我们的框架有效地同时解决了通信成本和客户漂移问题。

AI.tldr: 本文提出FedElasticNet框架，通过弹性网络正则化解决联邦学习中的通信效率与客户端漂移问题。
AI.motivation: 联邦学习面临高通信成本和数据异质性导致的客户端漂移双重挑战，现有方法难以同时优化两者。
AI.method: 结合弹性网络的L1正则化稀疏化本地更新以降低通信开销，L2正则化抑制数据异质性引起的漂移，框架可兼容FedAvg等现有技术。
AI.result: 实验验证FedElasticNet能有效减少通信量并缓解客户端漂移，实现通信效率与模型鲁棒性的协同优化。
AI.conclusion: FedElasticNet为联邦学习提供通用解决方案，在保持低通信成本的同时增强模型对数据异质性的适应能力。

It reduces the risks of privacy and security but faces important challenges including expensive communication costs and client drift issues. To address these issues, we propose FedElasticNet, a communication-efficient and drift-robust FL framework leveraging the elastic net. It repurposes two types of the elastic net regularizers (i.e., $\ell_1$ and $\ell_2$ penalties on the local model updates): (1) the $\ell_1$-norm regularizer sparsifies the local updates to reduce the communication costs and (2) the $\ell_2$-norm regularizer resolves the client drift problem by limiting the impact of drifting local updates due to data heterogeneity. We show that our framework effectively resolves the communication cost and client drift problems simultaneously. 联邦学习 (FL) 是一种分布式方法，用于在一组本地客户端上训练全局模型，同时保持数据本地化。它降低了隐私和安全风险，但面临着重要挑战，包括昂贵的通信成本和客户漂移问题。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了 FedElasticNet，这是一种利用弹性网络的通信高效且漂移鲁棒的 FL 框架。它重新利用了两种类型的弹性网络正则化器（即本地模型更新的 $\ell_1$ 和 $\ell_2$ 惩罚）：（1）$\ell_1$-norm 正则化器稀疏本地更新以减少通信成本，（2）$\ell_2$-norm 正则化器通过限制由于数据异构性而导致的本地更新漂移的影响来解决客户端漂移问题。 FedElasticNet是FL的通用框架；因此，无需额外成本，它就可以集成到现有的 FL 技术中，例如 FedAvg、FedProx、SCAFFOLD 和 FedDyn。我们表明，我们的框架有效地同时解决了通信成本和客户漂移问题。 本文提出FedElasticNet框架，通过弹性网络正则化解决联邦学习中的通信效率与客户端漂移问题。 Seonhyeong Kim,Jiheon Woo,Daewon Seo,Yongjune Kim cs.LG,cs.AI,stat.ML

authors_text: Denis Huseljic,Marek Herde,Mehmet Muejde,Bernhard Sick
title: A Review of Uncertainty Calibration in Pretrained Object Detectors
title_zh: 预训练目标检测器中不确定性校准的综述
abstract: In the field of deep learning based computer vision, the development of deep object detection has led to unique paradigms (e.g., two-stage or set-based) and architectures (e.g., Faster-RCNN or DETR) which enable outstanding performance on challenging benchmark datasets. Despite this, the trained object detectors typically do not reliably assess uncertainty regarding their own knowledge, and the quality of their probabilistic predictions is usually poor. As these are often used to make subsequent decisions, such inaccurate probabilistic predictions must be avoided. In this work, we investigate the uncertainty calibration properties of different pretrained object detection architectures in a multi-class setting. We propose a framework to ensure a fair, unbiased, and repeatable evaluation and conduct detailed analyses assessing the calibration under distributional changes (e.g., distributional shift and application to out-of-distribution data). Furthermore, by investigating the influence of different detector paradigms, post-processing steps, and suitable choices of metrics, we deliver novel insights into why poor detector calibration emerges. Based on these insights, we are able to improve the calibration of a detector by simply finetuning its last layer.
summary: In the field of deep learning based computer vision, the development of deep object detection has led to unique paradigms (e.g., two-stage or set-based) and architectures (e.g., Faster-RCNN or DETR) which enable outstanding performance on challenging benchmark datasets. Despite this, the trained object detectors typically do not reliably assess uncertainty regarding their own knowledge, and the quality of their probabilistic predictions is usually poor. As these are often used to make subsequent decisions, such inaccurate probabilistic predictions must be avoided. In this work, we investigate the uncertainty calibration properties of different pretrained object detection architectures in a multi-class setting. We propose a framework to ensure a fair, unbiased, and repeatable evaluation and conduct detailed analyses assessing the calibration under distributional changes (e.g., distributional shift and application to out-of-distribution data). Furthermore, by investigating the influence of different detector paradigms, post-processing steps, and suitable choices of metrics, we deliver novel insights into why poor detector calibration emerges. Based on these insights, we are able to improve the calibration of a detector by simply finetuning its last layer.
abstract_zh: 在基于深度学习的计算机视觉领域，深度目标检测的发展带来了独特的范式（例如，两阶段或基于集合）和架构（例如，Faster-RCNN 或 DETR），它们在具有挑战性的基准数据集上实现了出色的性能。尽管如此，经过训练的目标检测器通常无法可靠地评估其自身知识的不确定性，并且其概率预测的质量通常很差。由于这些通常用于做出后续决策，因此必须避免这种不准确的概率预测。在这项工作中，我们研究了多类设置中不同预训练对象检测架构的不确定性校准特性。我们提出了一个框架，以确保公平、公正和可重复的评估，并进行详细分析，评估分布变化下的校准（例如，分布变化和对分布外数据的应用）。此外，通过研究不同探测器范式、后处理步骤和合适的指标选择的影响，我们对探测器校准不良的原因提供了新颖的见解。基于这些见解，我们能够通过简单地微调探测器的最后一层来改进探测器的校准。

AI.tldr: 本文回顾并分析了预训练目标检测器的不确定性校准问题，提出了一种改进校准效果的方法。
AI.motivation: 尽管预训练目标检测器在基准数据集上表现优异，但其概率预测的可靠性较差，可能导致后续决策失误，需改进不确定性校准。
AI.method: 提出一种公平且可重复的评估框架，分析不同检测器范式、后处理步骤及指标选择对校准的影响，并通过微调最后一层提升校准效果。
AI.result: 揭示了检测器校准不佳的原因，发现微调最后一层可有效提升校准性能，并验证了框架在分布偏移场景下的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过分析与实验，本文为改进预训练检测器的不确定性校准提供了理论洞察和实用方案。

We propose a framework to ensure a fair, unbiased, and repeatable evaluation and conduct detailed analyses assessing the calibration under distributional changes (e.g., distributional shift and application to out-of-distribution data). Furthermore, by investigating the influence of different detector paradigms, post-processing steps, and suitable choices of metrics, we deliver novel insights into why poor detector calibration emerges. Based on these insights, we are able to improve the calibration of a detector by simply finetuning its last layer. 在基于深度学习的计算机视觉领域，深度目标检测的发展带来了独特的范式（例如，两阶段或基于集合）和架构（例如，Faster-RCNN 或 DETR），它们在具有挑战性的基准数据集上实现了出色的性能。尽管如此，经过训练的目标检测器通常无法可靠地评估其自身知识的不确定性，并且其概率预测的质量通常很差。由于这些通常用于做出后续决策，因此必须避免这种不准确的概率预测。在这项工作中，我们研究了多类设置中不同预训练对象检测架构的不确定性校准特性。我们提出了一个框架，以确保公平、公正和可重复的评估，并进行详细分析，评估分布变化下的校准（例如，分布变化和对分布外数据的应用）。此外，通过研究不同探测器范式、后处理步骤和合适的指标选择的影响，我们对探测器校准不良的原因提供了新颖的见解。基于这些见解，我们能够通过简单地微调探测器的最后一层来改进探测器的校准。 本文回顾并分析了预训练目标检测器的不确定性校准问题，提出了一种改进校准效果的方法。 Denis Huseljic,Marek Herde,Mehmet Muejde,Bernhard Sick cs.CV

authors_text: Mingxuan Ju,Wenhao Yu,Tong Zhao,Chuxu Zhang,Yanfang Ye
title: Grape: Knowledge Graph Enhanced Passage Reader for Open-domain Question Answering
title_zh: Grape：用于开放域问答的知识图增强段落阅读器
abstract: A common thread of open-domain question answering (QA) models employs a retriever-reader pipeline that first retrieves a handful of relevant passages from Wikipedia and then peruses the passages to produce an answer. However, even state-of-the-art readers fail to capture the complex relationships between entities appearing in questions and retrieved passages, leading to answers that contradict the facts. In light of this, we propose a novel knowledge Graph enhanced passage reader, namely Grape, to improve the reader performance for open-domain QA. Specifically, for each pair of question and retrieved passage, we first construct a localized bipartite graph, attributed to entity embeddings extracted from the intermediate layer of the reader model. Then, a graph neural network learns relational knowledge while fusing graph and contextual representations into the hidden states of the reader model. Experiments on three open-domain QA benchmarks show Grape can improve the state-of-the-art performance by up to 2.2 exact match score with a negligible overhead increase, with the same retriever and retrieved passages. Our code is publicly available at https://github.com/jumxglhf/GRAPE.
summary: A common thread of open-domain question answering (QA) models employs a retriever-reader pipeline that first retrieves a handful of relevant passages from Wikipedia and then peruses the passages to produce an answer. However, even state-of-the-art readers fail to capture the complex relationships between entities appearing in questions and retrieved passages, leading to answers that contradict the facts. In light of this, we propose a novel knowledge Graph enhanced passage reader, namely Grape, to improve the reader performance for open-domain QA. Specifically, for each pair of question and retrieved passage, we first construct a localized bipartite graph, attributed to entity embeddings extracted from the intermediate layer of the reader model. Then, a graph neural network learns relational knowledge while fusing graph and contextual representations into the hidden states of the reader model. Experiments on three open-domain QA benchmarks show Grape can improve the state-of-the-art performance by up to 2.2 exact match score with a negligible overhead increase, with the same retriever and retrieved passages. Our code is publicly available at https://github.com/jumxglhf/GRAPE.
abstract_zh: 开放域问答 (QA) 模型的常见线程采用检索器-阅读器管道，首先从维基百科检索一些相关段落，然后仔细阅读这些段落以产生答案。然而，即使是最先进的读者也无法捕捉问题中出现的实体和检索到的段落之间的复杂关系，从而导致答案与事实相矛盾。鉴于此，我们提出了一种新颖的知识图增强段落阅读器，即 Grape，以提高开放域 QA 的阅读器性能。具体来说，对于每对问题和检索到的段落，我们首先构建一个局部二部图，归因于从阅读器模型的中间层提取的实体嵌入。然后，图神经网络学习关系知识，同时将图和上下文表示融合到阅读器模型的隐藏状态中。对三个开放域 QA 基准的实验表明，使用相同的检索器和检索到的段落，Grape 可以将最先进的性能提高高达 2.2 的精确匹配分数，而开销的增加可以忽略不计。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/jumxglhf/GRAPE 上公开获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于知识图谱增强的段落阅读器Grape，用于改进开放领域问答任务中的阅读器性能。
AI.motivation: 现有开放领域问答模型的阅读器难以捕捉问题与检索段落中实体间的复杂关系，导致答案与事实矛盾。
AI.method: 构建局部二分图并利用图神经网络，将知识图谱信息与上下文表示融合到阅读器模型的隐藏状态中。
AI.result: 在三个基准测试中，Grape在保持相同检索器和检索段落的情况下，将精确匹配分数提升最高2.2分，且计算开销可忽略。
AI.conclusion: 知识图谱增强的阅读器能有效提升开放领域问答性能，且具有较高的计算效率。

authors_text: Itzik Klein
title: Data-Driven Meets Navigation: Concepts, Models, and Experimental Validation
title_zh: 数据驱动与导航的结合：概念、模型和实验验证
abstract: The purpose of navigation is to determine the position, velocity, and orientation of manned and autonomous platforms, humans, and animals. Obtaining accurate navigation commonly requires fusion between several sensors, such as inertial sensors and global navigation satellite systems, in a model-based, nonlinear estimation framework. Recently, data-driven approaches applied in various fields show state-of-the-art performance, compared to model-based methods. In this paper we review multidisciplinary, data-driven based navigation algorithms developed and experimentally proven at the Autonomous Navigation and Sensor Fusion Lab (ANSFL) including algorithms suitable for human and animal applications, varied autonomous platforms, and multi-purpose navigation and fusion approaches
summary: The purpose of navigation is to determine the position, velocity, and orientation of manned and autonomous platforms, humans, and animals. Obtaining accurate navigation commonly requires fusion between several sensors, such as inertial sensors and global navigation satellite systems, in a model-based, nonlinear estimation framework. Recently, data-driven approaches applied in various fields show state-of-the-art performance, compared to model-based methods. In this paper we review multidisciplinary, data-driven based navigation algorithms developed and experimentally proven at the Autonomous Navigation and Sensor Fusion Lab (ANSFL) including algorithms suitable for human and animal applications, varied autonomous platforms, and multi-purpose navigation and fusion approaches
abstract_zh: 导航的目的是确定载人和自主平台、人类和动物的位置、速度和方向。获得准确的导航通常需要在基于模型的非线性估计框架中融合多个传感器，例如惯性传感器和全球导航卫星系统。最近，与基于模型的方法相比，应用于各个领域的数据驱动方法显示出了最先进的性能。在本文中，我们回顾了自主导航和传感器融合实验室（ANSFL）开发并经过实验验证的多学科、基于数据驱动的导航算法，包括适合人类和动物应用的算法、各种自主平台以及多用途导航和融合方法

AI.tldr: 本文回顾了自主导航与传感器融合实验室开发的多学科数据驱动导航算法，并通过实验验证其在人类、动物及多平台应用中的有效性。
AI.motivation: 传统基于模型的导航方法依赖传感器融合且复杂度高，而数据驱动方法在多个领域表现出更优性能，需探索其在导航中的应用潜力。
AI.method: 系统梳理并实验验证ANSFL实验室提出的多类数据驱动导航算法，涵盖人类/动物应用、多平台适配及多用途融合技术。
AI.result: 验证了数据驱动算法在自主平台、生物导航等场景中的可行性，展示了其相对于传统方法的性能优势。
AI.conclusion: 数据驱动方法为导航领域提供新思路，未来需进一步优化算法泛化能力与跨学科应用适配性。

authors_text: Wenhu Chen,Hexiang Hu,Xi Chen,Pat Verga,William W. Cohen
title: MuRAG: Multimodal Retrieval-Augmented Generator for Open Question Answering over Images and Text
title_zh: MuRAG：用于图像和文本开放式问答的多模态检索增强生成器
abstract: While language Models store a massive amount of world knowledge implicitly in their parameters, even very large models often fail to encode information about rare entities and events, while incurring huge computational costs. Recently, retrieval-augmented models, such as REALM, RAG, and RETRO, have incorporated world knowledge into language generation by leveraging an external non-parametric index and have demonstrated impressive performance with constrained model sizes. However, these methods are restricted to retrieving only textual knowledge, neglecting the ubiquitous amount of knowledge in other modalities like images -- much of which contains information not covered by any text. To address this limitation, we propose the first Multimodal Retrieval-Augmented Transformer (MuRAG), which accesses an external non-parametric multimodal memory to augment language generation. MuRAG is pre-trained with a mixture of large-scale image-text and text-only corpora using a joint contrastive and generative loss. We perform experiments on two different datasets that require retrieving and reasoning over both images and text to answer a given query: WebQA, and MultimodalQA. Our results show that MuRAG achieves state-of-the-art accuracy, outperforming existing models by 10-20\% absolute on both datasets and under both distractor and full-wiki settings.
summary: While language Models store a massive amount of world knowledge implicitly in their parameters, even very large models often fail to encode information about rare entities and events, while incurring huge computational costs. Recently, retrieval-augmented models, such as REALM, RAG, and RETRO, have incorporated world knowledge into language generation by leveraging an external non-parametric index and have demonstrated impressive performance with constrained model sizes. However, these methods are restricted to retrieving only textual knowledge, neglecting the ubiquitous amount of knowledge in other modalities like images -- much of which contains information not covered by any text. To address this limitation, we propose the first Multimodal Retrieval-Augmented Transformer (MuRAG), which accesses an external non-parametric multimodal memory to augment language generation. MuRAG is pre-trained with a mixture of large-scale image-text and text-only corpora using a joint contrastive and generative loss. We perform experiments on two different datasets that require retrieving and reasoning over both images and text to answer a given query: WebQA, and MultimodalQA. Our results show that MuRAG achieves state-of-the-art accuracy, outperforming existing models by 10-20\% absolute on both datasets and under both distractor and full-wiki settings.
abstract_zh: 虽然语言模型在其参数中隐式存储了大量的世界知识，但即使非常大的模型也常常无法对有关罕见实体和事件的信息进行编码，同时会产生巨大的计算成本。最近，诸如 REALM、RAG 和 RETRO 之类的检索增强模型通过利用外部非参数索引将世界知识融入到语言生成中，并在模型大小受限的情况下展示了令人印象深刻的性能。然而，这些方法仅限于检索文本知识，忽略了图像等其他形式中无处不在的知识——其中大部分包含任何文本未涵盖的信息。为了解决这个限制，我们提出了第一个多模态检索增强变压器（MuRAG），它访问外部非参数多模态存储器来增强语言生成。 MuRAG 使用联合对比和生成损失，使用大规模图像文本和纯文本语料库的混合进行预训练。我们对两个不同的数据集进行实验，这两个数据集需要对图像和文本进行检索和推理来回答给定的查询：WebQA 和 MultimodalQA。我们的结果表明，MuRAG 实现了最先进的准确性，在两个数据集上以及在干扰器和全维基设置下绝对优于现有模型 10-20%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出MuRAG，一种结合图像和文本多模态检索增强生成模型，用于开放域问答任务。
AI.motivation: 现有检索增强模型（如RAG）仅能检索文本知识，无法利用图像等其他模态信息，而图像中包含大量未被文本覆盖的知识。
AI.method: 构建多模态非参数记忆库，融合图像-文本与纯文本数据，采用联合对比学习和生成损失进行预训练。
AI.result: 在WebQA和MultimodalQA数据集上，MuRAG在两种设置下均超越现有模型10-20%绝对准确率。
AI.conclusion: MuRAG通过整合多模态检索信息，显著提升了开放域问答任务的性能，验证了多模态知识融合的有效性。

search_text: MuRAG: Multimodal Retrieval-Augmented Generator for Open Question Answering over Images and Text MuRAG：用于图像和文本开放式问答的多模态检索增强生成器 While language Models store a massive amount of world knowledge implicitly in their parameters, even very large models often fail to encode information about rare entities and events, while incurring huge computational costs. Recently, retrieval-augmented models, such as REALM, RAG, and RETRO, have incorporated world knowledge into language generation by leveraging an external non-parametric index and have demonstrated impressive performance with constrained model sizes. However, these methods are restricted to retrieving only textual knowledge, neglecting the ubiquitous amount of knowledge in other modalities like images -- much of which contains information not covered by any text. To address this limitation, we propose the first Multimodal Retrieval-Augmented Transformer (MuRAG), which accesses an external non-parametric multimodal memory to augment language generation. MuRAG is pre-trained with a mixture of large-scale image-text and text-only corpora using a joint contrastive and generative loss. We perform experiments on two different datasets that require retrieving and reasoning over both images and text to answer a given query: WebQA, and MultimodalQA. Our results show that MuRAG achieves state-of-the-art accuracy, outperforming existing models by 10-20\% absolute on both datasets and under both distractor and full-wiki settings. 虽然语言模型在其参数中隐式存储了大量的世界知识，但即使非常大的模型也常常无法对有关罕见实体和事件的信息进行编码，同时会产生巨大的计算成本。最近，诸如 REALM、RAG 和 RETRO 之类的检索增强模型通过利用外部非参数索引将世界知识融入到语言生成中，并在模型大小受限的情况下展示了令人印象深刻的性能。然而，这些方法仅限于检索文本知识，忽略了图像等其他形式中无处不在的知识——其中大部分包含任何文本未涵盖的信息。为了解决这个限制，我们提出了第一个多模态检索增强变压器（MuRAG），它访问外部非参数多模态存储器来增强语言生成。 MuRAG 使用联合对比和生成损失，使用大规模图像文本和纯文本语料库的混合进行预训练。我们对两个不同的数据集进行实验，这两个数据集需要对图像和文本进行检索和推理来回答给定的查询：WebQA 和 MultimodalQA。我们的结果表明，MuRAG 实现了最先进的准确性，在两个数据集上以及在干扰器和全维基设置下绝对优于现有模型 10-20%。 本文提出MuRAG，一种结合图像和文本多模态检索增强生成模型，用于开放域问答任务。 Wenhu Chen,Hexiang Hu,Xi Chen,Pat Verga,William W. Cohen cs.CL,cs.AI,cs.CV

authors_text: Siyu Yuan,Deqing Yang,Jiaqing Liang,Zhixu Li,Jinxi Liu,Jingyue Huang,Yanghua Xiao
title: Generative Entity Typing with Curriculum Learning
title_zh: 通过课程学习生成实体类型
abstract: Entity typing aims to assign types to the entity mentions in given texts. The traditional classification-based entity typing paradigm has two unignorable drawbacks: 1) it fails to assign an entity to the types beyond the predefined type set, and 2) it can hardly handle few-shot and zero-shot situations where many long-tail types only have few or even no training instances. To overcome these drawbacks, we propose a novel generative entity typing (GET) paradigm: given a text with an entity mention, the multiple types for the role that the entity plays in the text are generated with a pre-trained language model (PLM). However, PLMs tend to generate coarse-grained types after fine-tuning upon the entity typing dataset. Besides, we only have heterogeneous training data consisting of a small portion of human-annotated data and a large portion of auto-generated but low-quality data. To tackle these problems, we employ curriculum learning (CL) to train our GET model upon the heterogeneous data, where the curriculum could be self-adjusted with the self-paced learning according to its comprehension of the type granularity and data heterogeneity. Our extensive experiments upon the datasets of different languages and downstream tasks justify the superiority of our GET model over the state-of-the-art entity typing models. The code has been released on https://github.com/siyuyuan/GET.
summary: Entity typing aims to assign types to the entity mentions in given texts. The traditional classification-based entity typing paradigm has two unignorable drawbacks: 1) it fails to assign an entity to the types beyond the predefined type set, and 2) it can hardly handle few-shot and zero-shot situations where many long-tail types only have few or even no training instances. To overcome these drawbacks, we propose a novel generative entity typing (GET) paradigm: given a text with an entity mention, the multiple types for the role that the entity plays in the text are generated with a pre-trained language model (PLM). However, PLMs tend to generate coarse-grained types after fine-tuning upon the entity typing dataset. Besides, we only have heterogeneous training data consisting of a small portion of human-annotated data and a large portion of auto-generated but low-quality data. To tackle these problems, we employ curriculum learning (CL) to train our GET model upon the heterogeneous data, where the curriculum could be self-adjusted with the self-paced learning according to its comprehension of the type granularity and data heterogeneity. Our extensive experiments upon the datasets of different languages and downstream tasks justify the superiority of our GET model over the state-of-the-art entity typing models. The code has been released on https://github.com/siyuyuan/GET.
abstract_zh: 实体类型旨在为给定文本中提及的实体分配类型。传统的基于分类的实体类型范式有两个不可忽视的缺点：1）它无法将实体分配给预定义类型集之外的类型，2）它很难处理少样本和零样本情况，其中许多长尾类型只有很少甚至没有训练实例。为了克服这些缺点，我们提出了一种新颖的生成实体类型（GET）范例：给定一个带有实体提及的文本，该实体在文本中扮演的角色的多种类型是通过预先训练的语言模型（PLM）生成的。然而，PLM 在对实体类型数据集进行微调后往往会生成粗粒度类型。此外，我们只有异构训练数据，其中包括一小部分人工注释的数据和大部分自动生成的低质量数据。为了解决这些问题，我们采用课程学习（CL）在异构数据上训练我们的 GET 模型，其中课程可以根据对类型粒度和数据异构性的理解，通过自定进度的学习进行自我调整。我们对不同语言和下游任务的数据集进行的广泛实验证明了我们的 GET 模型相对于最先进的实体类型模型的优越性。代码已发布于https://github.com/siyuyuan/GET。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于生成模型和课程学习的实体类型标注方法（GET），以解决传统分类方法在处理未预定义类型和小样本/零样本场景时的不足。
AI.motivation: 传统实体类型标注方法无法处理超出预定义类型集的实体类型，且在小样本或零样本情况下表现不佳，同时预训练语言模型生成的类型粒度较粗，训练数据质量不一。
AI.method: 采用生成式框架利用预训练语言模型生成实体类型，并引入课程学习策略，通过自适应调整训练难度来应对数据异质性和类型粒度问题。
AI.result: 在多语言数据集和下游任务上的实验表明，GET模型在性能上优于现有最先进的实体类型标注模型。
AI.conclusion: 生成式实体类型标注结合课程学习能有效提升模型对未定义类型和小样本场景的适应能力，具有广泛的应用前景。
