authors_text: Zixing Zhang,Thorin Farnsworth,Senling Lin,Salah Karout
title: WakeUpNet: A Mobile-Transformer based Framework for End-to-End Streaming Voice Trigger
title_zh: WakeUpNet：基于 Mobile Transformer 的端到端流式语音触发框架
abstract: End-to-end models have gradually become the main technical stream for voice trigger, aiming to achieve an utmost prediction accuracy but with a small footprint. In present paper, we propose an end-to-end voice trigger framework, namely WakeupNet, which is basically structured on a Transformer encoder. The purpose of this framework is to explore the context-capturing capability of Transformer, as sequential information is vital for wakeup-word detection. However, the conventional Transformer encoder is too large to fit our task. To address this issue, we introduce different model compression approaches to shrink the vanilla one into a tiny one, called mobile-Transformer. To evaluate the performance of mobile-Transformer, we conduct extensive experiments on a large public-available dataset HiMia. The obtained results indicate that introduced mobile-Transformer significantly outperforms other frequently used models for voice trigger in both clean and noisy scenarios.
summary: End-to-end models have gradually become the main technical stream for voice trigger, aiming to achieve an utmost prediction accuracy but with a small footprint. In present paper, we propose an end-to-end voice trigger framework, namely WakeupNet, which is basically structured on a Transformer encoder. The purpose of this framework is to explore the context-capturing capability of Transformer, as sequential information is vital for wakeup-word detection. However, the conventional Transformer encoder is too large to fit our task. To address this issue, we introduce different model compression approaches to shrink the vanilla one into a tiny one, called mobile-Transformer. To evaluate the performance of mobile-Transformer, we conduct extensive experiments on a large public-available dataset HiMia. The obtained results indicate that introduced mobile-Transformer significantly outperforms other frequently used models for voice trigger in both clean and noisy scenarios.
abstract_zh: 端到端模型逐渐成为语音触发的主要技术流，旨在以较小的占用空间实现最大的预测精度。在本文中，我们提出了一种端到端语音触发框架，即 WakeupNet，它基本上是在 Transformer 编码器上构建的。该框架的目的是探索 Transformer 的上下文捕获能力，因为顺序信息对于唤醒词检测至关重要。然而，传统的 Transformer 编码器太大，无法满足我们的任务。为了解决这个问题，我们引入了不同的模型压缩方法，将普通模型压缩为很小的模型，称为 mobile-Transformer。为了评估 mobile-Transformer 的性能，我们在大型公共数据集 HiMia 上进行了广泛的实验。获得的结果表明，在干净和嘈杂的场景中，引入的 mobile-Transformer 明显优于其他常用的语音触发模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出WakeUpNet，一种基于移动Transformer的端到端流式唤醒词检测框架，旨在实现高精度且模型轻量化。
AI.motivation: 现有唤醒词检测模型虽追求高精度，但体积过大，难以满足移动端部署需求，需在模型压缩与性能间取得平衡。
AI.method: 以Transformer编码器为核心，通过模型压缩技术（如通道剪枝、量化等）将其压缩为轻量级mobile-Transformer，并在HiMia数据集上进行多场景验证。
AI.result: mobile-Transformer在干净和噪声环境下均优于主流唤醒词检测模型，验证了其有效性与鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 通过结构压缩与Transformer的上下文建模能力结合，可在保证检测精度的同时显著降低模型复杂度，适用于移动端流式唤醒场景。

search_text: WakeUpNet: A Mobile-Transformer based Framework for End-to-End Streaming Voice Trigger WakeUpNet：基于 Mobile Transformer 的端到端流式语音触发框架 End-to-end models have gradually become the main technical stream for voice trigger, aiming to achieve an utmost prediction accuracy but with a small footprint. In present paper, we propose an end-to-end voice trigger framework, namely WakeupNet, which is basically structured on a Transformer encoder. The purpose of this framework is to explore the context-capturing capability of Transformer, as sequential information is vital for wakeup-word detection. However, the conventional Transformer encoder is too large to fit our task. To address this issue, we introduce different model compression approaches to shrink the vanilla one into a tiny one, called mobile-Transformer. To evaluate the performance of mobile-Transformer, we conduct extensive experiments on a large public-available dataset HiMia. The obtained results indicate that introduced mobile-Transformer significantly outperforms other frequently used models for voice trigger in both clean and noisy scenarios. 端到端模型逐渐成为语音触发的主要技术流，旨在以较小的占用空间实现最大的预测精度。在本文中，我们提出了一种端到端语音触发框架，即 WakeupNet，它基本上是在 Transformer 编码器上构建的。该框架的目的是探索 Transformer 的上下文捕获能力，因为顺序信息对于唤醒词检测至关重要。然而，传统的 Transformer 编码器太大，无法满足我们的任务。为了解决这个问题，我们引入了不同的模型压缩方法，将普通模型压缩为很小的模型，称为 mobile-Transformer。为了评估 mobile-Transformer 的性能，我们在大型公共数据集 HiMia 上进行了广泛的实验。获得的结果表明，在干净和嘈杂的场景中，引入的 mobile-Transformer 明显优于其他常用的语音触发模型。 本文提出WakeUpNet，一种基于移动Transformer的端到端流式唤醒词检测框架，旨在实现高精度且模型轻量化。 Zixing Zhang,Thorin Farnsworth,Senling Lin,Salah Karout cs.SD,eess.AS

authors_text: Ljupcho Milosheski,Gregor Cerar,Blaž Bertalanič,Carolina Fortuna,Mihael Mohorčič
title: Self-supervised Learning for Clustering of Wireless Spectrum Activity
title_zh: 无线频谱活动聚类的自监督学习
abstract: In recent years, much work has been done on processing of wireless spectrum data involving machine learning techniques in domain-related problems for cognitive radio networks, such as anomaly detection, modulation classification, technology classification and device fingerprinting. Most of the solutions are based on labeled data, created in a controlled manner and processed with supervised learning approaches. However, spectrum data measured in real-world environment is highly nondeterministic, making its labeling a laborious and expensive process, requiring domain expertise, thus being one of the main drawbacks of using supervised learning approaches in this domain. In this paper, we investigate the use of self-supervised learning (SSL) for exploring spectrum activities in a real-world unlabeled data. In particular, we compare the performance of two SSL models, one based on a reference DeepCluster architecture and one adapted for spectrum activity identification and clustering, and a baseline model based on K-means clustering algorithm. We show that SSL models achieve superior performance regarding the quality of extracted features and clustering performance. With SSL models we achieve reduction of the feature vectors size by two orders of magnitude, while improving the performance by a factor of 2 to 2.5 across the evaluation metrics, supported by visual assessment. Additionally we show that adaptation of the reference SSL architecture to the domain data provides reduction of model complexity by one order of magnitude, while preserving or even improving the clustering performance.
summary: In recent years, much work has been done on processing of wireless spectrum data involving machine learning techniques in domain-related problems for cognitive radio networks, such as anomaly detection, modulation classification, technology classification and device fingerprinting. Most of the solutions are based on labeled data, created in a controlled manner and processed with supervised learning approaches. However, spectrum data measured in real-world environment is highly nondeterministic, making its labeling a laborious and expensive process, requiring domain expertise, thus being one of the main drawbacks of using supervised learning approaches in this domain. In this paper, we investigate the use of self-supervised learning (SSL) for exploring spectrum activities in a real-world unlabeled data. In particular, we compare the performance of two SSL models, one based on a reference DeepCluster architecture and one adapted for spectrum activity identification and clustering, and a baseline model based on K-means clustering algorithm. We show that SSL models achieve superior performance regarding the quality of extracted features and clustering performance. With SSL models we achieve reduction of the feature vectors size by two orders of magnitude, while improving the performance by a factor of 2 to 2.5 across the evaluation metrics, supported by visual assessment. Additionally we show that adaptation of the reference SSL architecture to the domain data provides reduction of model complexity by one order of magnitude, while preserving or even improving the clustering performance.
abstract_zh: 近年来，在涉及认知无线电网络领域相关问题的机器学习技术的无线频谱数据处理方面已经做了很多工作，例如异常检测、调制分类、技术分类和设备指纹识别。大多数解决方案都基于标记数据，以受控方式创建并使用监督学习方法进行处理。然而，在现实环境中测量的频谱数据具有高度的不确定性，使其标记成为一个费力且昂贵的过程，需要领域专业知识，因此是在该领域使用监督学习方法的主要缺点之一。在本文中，我们研究了如何使用自监督学习（SSL）来探索现实世界未标记数据中的频谱活动。特别是，我们比较了两种 SSL 模型的性能，一种基于参考 DeepCluster 架构，一种适用于频谱活动识别和聚类，以及一种基于 K 均值聚类算法的基线模型。我们证明 SSL 模型在提取特征的质量和聚类性能方面实现了卓越的性能。通过 SSL 模型，我们在视觉评估的支持下，将特征向量大小减少了两个数量级，同时将评估指标的性能提高了 2 至 2.5 倍。此外，我们还表明，将参考 SSL 架构适应域数据可以将模型复杂性降低一个数量级，同时保持甚至提高集群性能。

AI.tldr: 本文研究利用自监督学习（SSL）对无线频谱活动进行聚类，以解决传统监督学习在真实环境数据标注困难的问题。
AI.motivation: 真实环境中的无线频谱数据标注成本高且依赖领域知识，而监督学习方法在此领域存在局限性，需探索无需标注数据的替代方案。
AI.method: 比较两种SSL模型（基于DeepCluster架构及适应频谱识别的改进模型）与K-means基线模型，评估其在频谱活动聚类中的性能。
AI.result: SSL模型在特征质量与聚类性能上优于基线，特征向量规模缩减90%，性能提升2-2.5倍，且模型复杂度降低10倍。
AI.conclusion: 自监督学习在无线频谱聚类中表现优异，领域适应的SSL架构显著提升效率，为实际应用提供可行方案。

search_text: Self-supervised Learning for Clustering of Wireless Spectrum Activity 无线频谱活动聚类的自监督学习 In recent years, much work has been done on processing of wireless spectrum data involving machine learning techniques in domain-related problems for cognitive radio networks, such as anomaly detection, modulation classification, technology classification and device fingerprinting. Most of the solutions are based on labeled data, created in a controlled manner and processed with supervised learning approaches. However, spectrum data measured in real-world environment is highly nondeterministic, making its labeling a laborious and expensive process, requiring domain expertise, thus being one of the main drawbacks of using supervised learning approaches in this domain. In this paper, we investigate the use of self-supervised learning (SSL) for exploring spectrum activities in a real-world unlabeled data. In particular, we compare the performance of two SSL models, one based on a reference DeepCluster architecture and one adapted for spectrum activity identification and clustering, and a baseline model based on K-means clustering algorithm. We show that SSL models achieve superior performance regarding the quality of extracted features and clustering performance. With SSL models we achieve reduction of the feature vectors size by two orders of magnitude, while improving the performance by a factor of 2 to 2.5 across the evaluation metrics, supported by visual assessment. Additionally we show that adaptation of the reference SSL architecture to the domain data provides reduction of model complexity by one order of magnitude, while preserving or even improving the clustering performance. 近年来，在涉及认知无线电网络领域相关问题的机器学习技术的无线频谱数据处理方面已经做了很多工作，例如异常检测、调制分类、技术分类和设备指纹识别。大多数解决方案都基于标记数据，以受控方式创建并使用监督学习方法进行处理。然而，在现实环境中测量的频谱数据具有高度的不确定性，使其标记成为一个费力且昂贵的过程，需要领域专业知识，因此是在该领域使用监督学习方法的主要缺点之一。在本文中，我们研究了如何使用自监督学习（SSL）来探索现实世界未标记数据中的频谱活动。特别是，我们比较了两种 SSL 模型的性能，一种基于参考 DeepCluster 架构，一种适用于频谱活动识别和聚类，以及一种基于 K 均值聚类算法的基线模型。我们证明 SSL 模型在提取特征的质量和聚类性能方面实现了卓越的性能。通过 SSL 模型，我们在视觉评估的支持下，将特征向量大小减少了两个数量级，同时将评估指标的性能提高了 2 至 2.5 倍。此外，我们还表明，将参考 SSL 架构适应域数据可以将模型复杂性降低一个数量级，同时保持甚至提高集群性能。 本文研究利用自监督学习（SSL）对无线频谱活动进行聚类，以解决传统监督学习在真实环境数据标注困难的问题。 Ljupcho Milosheski,Gregor Cerar,Blaž Bertalanič,Carolina Fortuna,Mihael Mohorčič cs.NI,cs.AI,cs.LG,eess.SP

authors_text: Danilo S. Carvalho,Giangiacomo Mercatali,Yingji Zhang,Andre Freitas
title: Learning Disentangled Representations for Natural Language Definitions
title_zh: 学习自然语言定义的解缠表示
abstract: Disentangling the encodings of neural models is a fundamental aspect for improving interpretability, semantic control and downstream task performance in Natural Language Processing. Currently, most disentanglement methods are unsupervised or rely on synthetic datasets with known generative factors. We argue that recurrent syntactic and semantic regularities in textual data can be used to provide the models with both structural biases and generative factors. We leverage the semantic structures present in a representative and semantically dense category of sentence types, definitional sentences, for training a Variational Autoencoder to learn disentangled representations. Our experimental results show that the proposed model outperforms unsupervised baselines on several qualitative and quantitative benchmarks for disentanglement, and it also improves the results in the downstream task of definition modeling.
summary: Disentangling the encodings of neural models is a fundamental aspect for improving interpretability, semantic control and downstream task performance in Natural Language Processing. Currently, most disentanglement methods are unsupervised or rely on synthetic datasets with known generative factors. We argue that recurrent syntactic and semantic regularities in textual data can be used to provide the models with both structural biases and generative factors. We leverage the semantic structures present in a representative and semantically dense category of sentence types, definitional sentences, for training a Variational Autoencoder to learn disentangled representations. Our experimental results show that the proposed model outperforms unsupervised baselines on several qualitative and quantitative benchmarks for disentanglement, and it also improves the results in the downstream task of definition modeling.
abstract_zh: 解开神经模型的编码是提高自然语言处理中的可解释性、语义控制和下游任务性能的一个基本方面。目前，大多数解缠结方法都是无监督的或依赖于具有已知生成因素的合成数据集。我们认为，文本数据中反复出现的句法和语义规律可用于为模型提供结构偏差和生成因素。我们利用具有代表性和语义密集的句子类型类别（定义句子）中存在的语义结构来训练变分自动编码器来学习解缠结的表示。我们的实验结果表明，所提出的模型在几个定性和定量解缠基准上优于无监督基线，并且还改善了定义建模下游任务的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种利用定义性句子训练变分自编码器以学习自然语言解耦表示的方法。
AI.motivation: 现有解耦方法依赖无监督学习或合成数据，难以有效利用文本中固有的句法语义规律。
AI.method: 基于定义性句子的语义结构，设计变分自编码器模型，通过捕捉句法和语义规律实现解耦表示学习。
AI.result: 在多个解耦评估基准和定义建模任务中，该模型均优于无监督基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 利用定义性句子的语义结构可有效提升解耦表示质量，并促进下游任务性能提升。

authors_text: Anu Jagannath,Jithin Jagannath
title: Embedding-Assisted Attentional Deep Learning for Real-World RF Fingerprinting of Bluetooth
title_zh: 用于蓝牙真实世界射频指纹识别的嵌入辅助注意力深度学习
comment: To Appear in IEEE Transactions on Cognitive Communications and Networking
comments: To Appear in IEEE Transactions on Cognitive Communications and Networking
abstract: A scalable and computationally efficient framework is designed to fingerprint real-world Bluetooth devices. We propose an embedding-assisted attentional framework (Mbed-ATN) suitable for fingerprinting actual Bluetooth devices. Its generalization capability is analyzed in different settings and the effect of sample length and anti-aliasing decimation is demonstrated. The embedding module serves as a dimensionality reduction unit that maps the high dimensional 3D input tensor to a 1D feature vector for further processing by the ATN module. Furthermore, unlike the prior research in this field, we closely evaluate the complexity of the model and test its fingerprinting capability with real-world Bluetooth dataset collected under a different time frame and experimental setting while being trained on another. Our study reveals a 9.17x and 65.2x lesser memory usage at a sample length of 100 kS when compared to the benchmark - GRU and Oracle models respectively. Further, the proposed Mbed-ATN showcases 16.9x fewer FLOPs and 7.5x lesser trainable parameters when compared to Oracle. Finally, we show that when subject to anti-aliasing decimation and at greater input sample lengths of 1 MS, the proposed Mbed-ATN framework results in a 5.32x higher TPR, 37.9% fewer false alarms, and 6.74x higher accuracy under the challenging real-world setting.
summary: A scalable and computationally efficient framework is designed to fingerprint real-world Bluetooth devices. We propose an embedding-assisted attentional framework (Mbed-ATN) suitable for fingerprinting actual Bluetooth devices. Its generalization capability is analyzed in different settings and the effect of sample length and anti-aliasing decimation is demonstrated. The embedding module serves as a dimensionality reduction unit that maps the high dimensional 3D input tensor to a 1D feature vector for further processing by the ATN module. Furthermore, unlike the prior research in this field, we closely evaluate the complexity of the model and test its fingerprinting capability with real-world Bluetooth dataset collected under a different time frame and experimental setting while being trained on another. Our study reveals a 9.17x and 65.2x lesser memory usage at a sample length of 100 kS when compared to the benchmark - GRU and Oracle models respectively. Further, the proposed Mbed-ATN showcases 16.9x fewer FLOPs and 7.5x lesser trainable parameters when compared to Oracle. Finally, we show that when subject to anti-aliasing decimation and at greater input sample lengths of 1 MS, the proposed Mbed-ATN framework results in a 5.32x higher TPR, 37.9% fewer false alarms, and 6.74x higher accuracy under the challenging real-world setting.
abstract_zh: 可扩展且计算高效的框架旨在对现实世界的蓝牙设备进行指纹识别。我们提出了一种适合对实际蓝牙设备进行指纹识别的嵌入辅助注意力框架（Mbed-ATN）。在不同设置下分析其泛化能力，并演示样本长度和抗锯齿抽取的影响。嵌入模块充当降维单元，将高维 3D 输入张量映射到 1D 特征向量，以供 ATN 模块进一步处理。此外，与该领域的先前研究不同，我们仔细评估了模型的复杂性，并使用在不同时间框架和实验设置下收集的真实世界蓝牙数据集测试其指纹识别能力，同时在另一个模型上进行训练。我们的研究表明，与基准（GRU 和 Oracle 模型）相比，样本长度为 100 kS 时，内存使用量分别减少了 9.17 倍和 65.2 倍。此外，与 Oracle 相比，拟议的 Mbed-ATN 的 FLOP 数减少了 16.9 倍，可训练参数减少了 7.5 倍。最后，我们表明，当进行抗锯齿抽取且输入样本长度为 1 MS 时，所提出的 Mbed-ATN 框架在具有挑战性的现实环境下可实现 5.32 倍的 TPR 提高、37.9% 的误报减少以及 6.74 倍的准确度提高。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种嵌入辅助注意力深度学习框架Mbed-ATN，用于实现实际场景中蓝牙设备的高效射频指纹识别。
AI.motivation: 现有蓝牙设备指纹识别方法在真实场景下存在计算复杂度高、泛化能力弱的问题，需设计更高效且适应不同实验条件的模型。
AI.method: 通过嵌入模块将高维3D输入张量映射为1D特征向量，结合注意力机制（ATN）进行特征提取，并在不同采样长度和抗混叠降采样条件下验证模型性能。
AI.result: 在100kS采样长度下，Mbed-ATN相比GRU和Oracle模型分别减少9.17倍内存占用，且参数量和计算量更优；在1MS采样长度下，其TPR提升5.32倍，误报率降低37.9%，准确率提升6.74倍。
AI.conclusion: Mbed-ATN在保持高识别精度的同时显著降低计算资源消耗，适用于复杂真实环境下的蓝牙设备指纹识别任务。

search_text: Embedding-Assisted Attentional Deep Learning for Real-World RF Fingerprinting of Bluetooth 用于蓝牙真实世界射频指纹识别的嵌入辅助注意力深度学习 A scalable and computationally efficient framework is designed to fingerprint real-world Bluetooth devices. We propose an embedding-assisted attentional framework (Mbed-ATN) suitable for fingerprinting actual Bluetooth devices. Its generalization capability is analyzed in different settings and the effect of sample length and anti-aliasing decimation is demonstrated. The embedding module serves as a dimensionality reduction unit that maps the high dimensional 3D input tensor to a 1D feature vector for further processing by the ATN module. Furthermore, unlike the prior research in this field, we closely evaluate the complexity of the model and test its fingerprinting capability with real-world Bluetooth dataset collected under a different time frame and experimental setting while being trained on another. Our study reveals a 9.17x and 65.2x lesser memory usage at a sample length of 100 kS when compared to the benchmark - GRU and Oracle models respectively. Further, the proposed Mbed-ATN showcases 16.9x fewer FLOPs and 7.5x lesser trainable parameters when compared to Oracle. Finally, we show that when subject to anti-aliasing decimation and at greater input sample lengths of 1 MS, the proposed Mbed-ATN framework results in a 5.32x higher TPR, 37.9% fewer false alarms, and 6.74x higher accuracy under the challenging real-world setting. 可扩展且计算高效的框架旨在对现实世界的蓝牙设备进行指纹识别。我们提出了一种适合对实际蓝牙设备进行指纹识别的嵌入辅助注意力框架（Mbed-ATN）。在不同设置下分析其泛化能力，并演示样本长度和抗锯齿抽取的影响。嵌入模块充当降维单元，将高维 3D 输入张量映射到 1D 特征向量，以供 ATN 模块进一步处理。此外，与该领域的先前研究不同，我们仔细评估了模型的复杂性，并使用在不同时间框架和实验设置下收集的真实世界蓝牙数据集测试其指纹识别能力，同时在另一个模型上进行训练。我们的研究表明，与基准（GRU 和 Oracle 模型）相比，样本长度为 100 kS 时，内存使用量分别减少了 9.17 倍和 65.2 倍。此外，与 Oracle 相比，拟议的 Mbed-ATN 的 FLOP 数减少了 16.9 倍，可训练参数减少了 7.5 倍。最后，我们表明，当进行抗锯齿抽取且输入样本长度为 1 MS 时，所提出的 Mbed-ATN 框架在具有挑战性的现实环境下可实现 5.32 倍的 TPR 提高、37.9% 的误报减少以及 6.74 倍的准确度提高。 本文提出一种嵌入辅助注意力深度学习框架Mbed-ATN，用于实现实际场景中蓝牙设备的高效射频指纹识别。 Anu Jagannath,Jithin Jagannath cs.NI,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Quantao Yang,Johannes A. Stork,Todor Stoyanov
title: Transferring Knowledge for Reinforcement Learning in Contact-Rich Manipulation
title_zh: 在接触丰富的操作中传递强化学习的知识
abstract: In manufacturing, assembly tasks have been a challenge for learning algorithms due to variant dynamics of different environments. Reinforcement learning (RL) is a promising framework to automatically learn these tasks, yet it is still not easy to apply a learned policy or skill, that is the ability of solving a task, to a similar environment even if the deployment conditions are only slightly different. In this paper, we address the challenge of transferring knowledge within a family of similar tasks by leveraging multiple skill priors. We propose to learn prior distribution over the specific skill required to accomplish each task and compose the family of skill priors to guide learning the policy for a new task by comparing the similarity between the target task and the prior ones. Our method learns a latent action space representing the skill embedding from demonstrated trajectories for each prior task. We have evaluated our method on a set of peg-in-hole insertion tasks and demonstrate better generalization to new tasks that have never been encountered during training.
summary: In manufacturing, assembly tasks have been a challenge for learning algorithms due to variant dynamics of different environments. Reinforcement learning (RL) is a promising framework to automatically learn these tasks, yet it is still not easy to apply a learned policy or skill, that is the ability of solving a task, to a similar environment even if the deployment conditions are only slightly different. In this paper, we address the challenge of transferring knowledge within a family of similar tasks by leveraging multiple skill priors. We propose to learn prior distribution over the specific skill required to accomplish each task and compose the family of skill priors to guide learning the policy for a new task by comparing the similarity between the target task and the prior ones. Our method learns a latent action space representing the skill embedding from demonstrated trajectories for each prior task. We have evaluated our method on a set of peg-in-hole insertion tasks and demonstrate better generalization to new tasks that have never been encountered during training.
abstract_zh: 在制造中，由于不同环境的动态变化，装配任务一直是学习算法的挑战。强化学习（RL）是自动学习这些任务的一个有前途的框架，但即使部署条件仅略有不同，将学到的策略或技能（即解决任务的能力）应用到类似的环境中仍然不容易。在本文中，我们通过利用多种技能先验来解决在一系列类似任务中转移知识的挑战。我们建议学习完成每项任务所需的特定技能的先验分布，并通过比较目标任务与先验任务之间的相似性来组成技能先验家族，以指导学习新任务的策略。我们的方法从每个先前任务的演示轨迹中学习代表技能嵌入的潜在动作空间。我们在一组钉孔插入任务上评估了我们的方法，并展示了对训练期间从未遇到过的新任务的更好的泛化能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于多技能先验的知识迁移方法，用于强化学习在接触密集型操作任务中的应用，以提高策略在相似环境中的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 制造装配任务因环境动态变化导致传统强化学习策略难以迁移，需解决相似环境下策略适应性差的问题。
AI.method: 通过学习每个任务的技能先验分布，构建潜在动作空间表示技能嵌入，并利用任务相似性指导新任务策略学习。
AI.result: 在孔洞插入任务实验中，方法表现出对训练中未遇见过的新任务更强的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 多技能先验迁移方法有效提升了强化学习在接触密集型操作任务中的跨环境适应性。

authors_text: Quentin Garrido,Randall Balestriero,Laurent Najman,Yann Lecun
title: RankMe: Assessing the downstream performance of pretrained self-supervised representations by their rank
title_zh: RankMe：通过排名评估预训练自监督表示的下游性能
comment: ef:The Fortieth International Conference on Machine Learning, 2023, Honolulu, United States
comments: ef:The Fortieth International Conference on Machine Learning, 2023, Honolulu, United States
abstract: Joint-Embedding Self Supervised Learning (JE-SSL) has seen a rapid development, with the emergence of many method variations but only few principled guidelines that would help practitioners to successfully deploy them. The main reason for that pitfall comes from JE-SSL's core principle of not employing any input reconstruction therefore lacking visual cues of unsuccessful training. Adding non informative loss values to that, it becomes difficult to deploy SSL on a new dataset for which no labels can help to judge the quality of the learned representation. In this study, we develop a simple unsupervised criterion that is indicative of the quality of the learned JE-SSL representations: their effective rank. Albeit simple and computationally friendly, this method -- coined RankMe -- allows one to assess the performance of JE-SSL representations, even on different downstream datasets, without requiring any labels. A further benefit of RankMe is that it does not have any training or hyper-parameters to tune. Through thorough empirical experiments involving hundreds of training episodes, we demonstrate how RankMe can be used for hyperparameter selection with nearly no reduction in final performance compared to the current selection method that involve a dataset's labels. We hope that RankMe will facilitate the deployment of JE-SSL towards domains that do not have the opportunity to rely on labels for representations' quality assessment.
summary: Joint-Embedding Self Supervised Learning (JE-SSL) has seen a rapid development, with the emergence of many method variations but only few principled guidelines that would help practitioners to successfully deploy them. The main reason for that pitfall comes from JE-SSL's core principle of not employing any input reconstruction therefore lacking visual cues of unsuccessful training. Adding non informative loss values to that, it becomes difficult to deploy SSL on a new dataset for which no labels can help to judge the quality of the learned representation. In this study, we develop a simple unsupervised criterion that is indicative of the quality of the learned JE-SSL representations: their effective rank. Albeit simple and computationally friendly, this method -- coined RankMe -- allows one to assess the performance of JE-SSL representations, even on different downstream datasets, without requiring any labels. A further benefit of RankMe is that it does not have any training or hyper-parameters to tune. Through thorough empirical experiments involving hundreds of training episodes, we demonstrate how RankMe can be used for hyperparameter selection with nearly no reduction in final performance compared to the current selection method that involve a dataset's labels. We hope that RankMe will facilitate the deployment of JE-SSL towards domains that do not have the opportunity to rely on labels for representations' quality assessment.
abstract_zh: 联合嵌入自监督学习（JE-SSL）发展迅速，出现了许多方法变体，但只有很少的原则性指南可以帮助从业者成功部署它们。该陷阱的主要原因来自 JE-SSL 的核心原则，即不采用任何输入重建，因此缺乏训练失败的视觉提示。添加非信息性损失值后，在新数据集上部署 SSL 变得很困难，因为没有标签可以帮助判断学习表示的质量。在本研究中，我们开发了一个简单的无监督标准，该标准指示所学习的 JE-SSL 表示的质量：它们的有效排名。尽管简单且计算友好，但这种方法（创造的 RankMe）允许人们评估 JE-SSL 表示的性能，即使在不同的下游数据集上，也不需要任何标签。 RankMe 的另一个好处是它不需要任何训练或超参数来调整。通过涉及数百个训练集的彻底实证实验，我们演示了如何使用 RankMe 进行超参数选择，与当前涉及数据集标签的选择方法相比，最终性能几乎没有降低。我们希望 RankMe 能够促进 JE-SSL 在没有机会依赖标签进行表示质量评估的域中的部署。

AI.tldr: 本文提出RankMe方法，通过计算预训练自监督表示的有效秩来评估其下游任务性能，无需标签和超参数调整。
AI.motivation: 现有自监督学习方法缺乏有效评估表示质量的准则，尤其在无标签数据场景下难以判断模型训练效果。
AI.method: 开发无监督指标RankMe，通过计算特征表示矩阵的有效秩来衡量JE-SSL模型质量，无需训练过程和参数调优。
AI.result: 在数百次实验中证明RankMe可有效指导超参数选择，最终性能与基于标签的评估方法接近。
AI.conclusion: RankMe为无标签场景下的自监督学习模型部署提供了可行评估方案，促进其在新领域的应用。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出RankMe方法，通过计算预训练自监督表示的有效秩来评估其下游任务性能，无需标签和超参数调整。
ai_content.motivation: 现有自监督学习方法缺乏有效评估表示质量的准则，尤其在无标签数据场景下难以判断模型训练效果。

search_text: RankMe: Assessing the downstream performance of pretrained self-supervised representations by their rank RankMe：通过排名评估预训练自监督表示的下游性能 Joint-Embedding Self Supervised Learning (JE-SSL) has seen a rapid development, with the emergence of many method variations but only few principled guidelines that would help practitioners to successfully deploy them. The main reason for that pitfall comes from JE-SSL's core principle of not employing any input reconstruction therefore lacking visual cues of unsuccessful training. Adding non informative loss values to that, it becomes difficult to deploy SSL on a new dataset for which no labels can help to judge the quality of the learned representation. In this study, we develop a simple unsupervised criterion that is indicative of the quality of the learned JE-SSL representations: their effective rank. Albeit simple and computationally friendly, this method -- coined RankMe -- allows one to assess the performance of JE-SSL representations, even on different downstream datasets, without requiring any labels. A further benefit of RankMe is that it does not have any training or hyper-parameters to tune. Through thorough empirical experiments involving hundreds of training episodes, we demonstrate how RankMe can be used for hyperparameter selection with nearly no reduction in final performance compared to the current selection method that involve a dataset's labels. We hope that RankMe will facilitate the deployment of JE-SSL towards domains that do not have the opportunity to rely on labels for representations' quality assessment. 联合嵌入自监督学习（JE-SSL）发展迅速，出现了许多方法变体，但只有很少的原则性指南可以帮助从业者成功部署它们。该陷阱的主要原因来自 JE-SSL 的核心原则，即不采用任何输入重建，因此缺乏训练失败的视觉提示。添加非信息性损失值后，在新数据集上部署 SSL 变得很困难，因为没有标签可以帮助判断学习表示的质量。在本研究中，我们开发了一个简单的无监督标准，该标准指示所学习的 JE-SSL 表示的质量：它们的有效排名。尽管简单且计算友好，但这种方法（创造的 RankMe）允许人们评估 JE-SSL 表示的性能，即使在不同的下游数据集上，也不需要任何标签。 RankMe 的另一个好处是它不需要任何训练或超参数来调整。通过涉及数百个训练集的彻底实证实验，我们演示了如何使用 RankMe 进行超参数选择，与当前涉及数据集标签的选择方法相比，最终性能几乎没有降低。我们希望 RankMe 能够促进 JE-SSL 在没有机会依赖标签进行表示质量评估的域中的部署。 本文提出RankMe方法，通过计算预训练自监督表示的有效秩来评估其下游任务性能，无需标签和超参数调整。 Quentin Garrido,Randall Balestriero,Laurent Najman,Yann Lecun cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CV

authors_text: Ye Zhu,Yu Wu,Nicu Sebe,Yan Yan
title: Vision+X: A Survey on Multimodal Learning in the Light of Data
title_zh: Vision+X：数据视角下的多模态学习调查
comment: Survey paper on multimodal learning and generation, to appear at IEEE Transactions on Pattern Analysis and Machine Intelligence (TPAMI)
comments: Survey paper on multimodal learning and generation, to appear at IEEE Transactions on Pattern Analysis and Machine Intelligence (TPAMI)
abstract: We are perceiving and communicating with the world in a multisensory manner, where different information sources are sophisticatedly processed and interpreted by separate parts of the human brain to constitute a complex, yet harmonious and unified sensing system. To endow the machines with true intelligence, multimodal machine learning that incorporates data from various sources has become an increasingly popular research area with emerging technical advances in recent years. In this paper, we present a survey on multimodal machine learning from a novel perspective considering not only the purely technical aspects but also the intrinsic nature of different data modalities. We analyze the commonness and uniqueness of each data format mainly ranging from vision, audio, text, and motions, and then present the methodological advancements categorized by the combination of data modalities, such as Vision+Text, with slightly inclined emphasis on the visual data. We investigate the existing literature on multimodal learning from both the representation learning and downstream application levels, and provide an additional comparison in the light of their technical connections with the data nature, e.g., the semantic consistency between image objects and textual descriptions, and the rhythm correspondence between video dance moves and musical beats. We hope that the exploitation of the alignment as well as the existing gap between the intrinsic nature of data modality and the technical designs, will benefit future research studies to better address a specific challenge related to the concrete multimodal task, prompting a unified multimodal machine learning framework closer to a real human intelligence system.

To endow the machines with true intelligence, multimodal machine learning that incorporates data from various sources has become an increasingly popular research area with emerging technical advances in recent years. We analyze the commonness and uniqueness of each data format mainly ranging from vision, audio, text, and motions, and then present the methodological advancements categorized by the combination of data modalities, such as Vision+Text, with slightly inclined emphasis on the visual data. We investigate the existing literature on multimodal learning from both the representation learning and downstream application levels, and provide an additional comparison in the light of their technical connections with the data nature, e.g., the semantic consistency between image objects and textual descriptions, and the rhythm correspondence between video dance moves and musical beats. We hope that the exploitation of the alignment as well as the existing gap between the intrinsic nature of data modality and the technical designs, will benefit future research studies to better address a specific challenge related to the concrete multimodal task, prompting a unified multimodal machine learning framework closer to a real human intelligence system.
abstract_zh: 我们以多感官的方式感知和与世界交流，不同的信息源经过人脑不同部分的复杂处理和解释，构成了一个复杂但和谐统一的感知系统。为了赋予机器真正的智能，近年来，随着技术的不断进步，融合各种来源数据的多模态机器学习已成为越来越受欢迎的研究领域。在本文中，我们从一个新颖的角度对多模态机器学习进行了调查，不仅考虑了纯粹的技术方面，还考虑了不同数据模态的内在本质。我们分析了每种数据格式的共性和独特性，主要包括视觉、音频、文本和动作，然后根据数据模态的组合（例如视觉+文本）分类方法论的进展，稍微强调视觉数据。我们从表示学习和下游应用层面研究了多模态学习的现有文献，并根据它们与数据性质的技术联系进行了额外的比较，例如图像对象和文本描述之间的语义一致性，以及视频舞蹈动作和音乐节拍之间的节奏对应关系。我们希望利用这种一致性以及数据模态本质与技术设计之间存在的差距，将有利于未来的研究，以更好地解决与具体多模态任务相关的特定挑战，促使统一的多模态机器学习框架更接近真实的人类智能系统。

AI.tldr: 本文从数据视角综述多模态学习，分析视觉、文本等模态的共性与特性，分类讨论技术方法并比较其与数据本质的关联，旨在推动更贴近人类智能的统一框架。
AI.motivation: 人类通过多感官协同感知世界，而现有机器学习需突破单一模态限制，需系统性研究多模态数据本质与技术设计的关联以实现类人智能。
AI.method: 分析多模态数据（视觉/文本/音频等）的共性与独特性，按模态组合（如Vision+Text）分类技术方法，从表征学习与应用层面比较技术与数据本质的关联性（如语义一致性）。
AI.result: 系统梳理多模态学习技术脉络，揭示不同模态组合的技术特点，指出当前方法与数据本质之间的对齐程度及现存差距，为未来研究提供方向。
AI.conclusion: 通过弥合数据本质与技术设计的鸿沟，可推动多模态学习向更高效、更接近人类感知的统一框架发展，解决具体任务中的关键挑战。

authors_text: Ranwa Al Mallah,David Lopez
title: Blockchain-based Monitoring for Poison Attack Detection in Decentralized Federated Learning
title_zh: 基于区块链的去中心化联邦学习中的中毒攻击检测监控
abstract: Federated Learning (FL) is a machine learning technique that addresses the privacy challenges in terms of access rights of local datasets by enabling the training of a model across nodes holding their data samples locally. To achieve decentralized federated learning, blockchain-based FL was proposed as a distributed FL architecture. In decentralized FL, the chief is eliminated from the learning process as workers collaborate between each other to train the global model. Decentralized FL applications need to account for the additional delay incurred by blockchain-based FL deployments. Particularly in this setting, to detect targeted/untargeted poisoning attacks, we investigate the end-to-end learning completion latency of a realistic decentralized FL process protected against poisoning attacks. We propose a technique which consists in decoupling the monitoring phase from the detection phase in defenses against poisoning attacks in a decentralized federated learning deployment that aim at monitoring the behavior of the workers. We demonstrate that our proposed blockchain-based monitoring improved network scalability, robustness and time efficiency. The parallelization of operations results in minimized latency over the end-to-end communication, computation, and consensus delays incurred during the FL and blockchain operations.
summary: Federated Learning (FL) is a machine learning technique that addresses the privacy challenges in terms of access rights of local datasets by enabling the training of a model across nodes holding their data samples locally. To achieve decentralized federated learning, blockchain-based FL was proposed as a distributed FL architecture. In decentralized FL, the chief is eliminated from the learning process as workers collaborate between each other to train the global model. Decentralized FL applications need to account for the additional delay incurred by blockchain-based FL deployments. Particularly in this setting, to detect targeted/untargeted poisoning attacks, we investigate the end-to-end learning completion latency of a realistic decentralized FL process protected against poisoning attacks. We propose a technique which consists in decoupling the monitoring phase from the detection phase in defenses against poisoning attacks in a decentralized federated learning deployment that aim at monitoring the behavior of the workers. We demonstrate that our proposed blockchain-based monitoring improved network scalability, robustness and time efficiency. The parallelization of operations results in minimized latency over the end-to-end communication, computation, and consensus delays incurred during the FL and blockchain operations.
abstract_zh: 联邦学习 (FL) 是一种机器学习技术，通过在本地保存数据样本的节点之间进行模型训练，解决本地数据集访问权方面的隐私挑战。为了实现去中心化的联邦学习，基于区块链的 FL 作为分布式 FL 架构被提出。在去中心化 FL 中，由于工作人员之间相互协作来训练全局模型，因此领导者被排除在学习过程之外。去中心化的 FL 应用程序需要考虑基于区块链的 FL 部署所带来的额外延迟。特别是在这种情况下，为了检测有针对性/无针对性的中毒攻击，我们研究了防止中毒攻击的现实去中心化 FL 过程的端到端学习完成延迟。我们提出了一种技术，该技术包括将监控阶段与检测阶段分离，以防御去中心化联合学习部署中的中毒攻击，旨在监控工作人员的行为。我们证明，我们提出的基于区块链的监控提高了网络可扩展性、稳健性和时间效率。操作的并行化可以最大限度地减少 FL 和区块链操作期间发生的端到端通信、计算和共识延迟的延迟。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于区块链的监控技术，用于在去中心化联邦学习中检测投毒攻击，并优化端到端延迟。
AI.motivation: 去中心化联邦学习通过区块链实现隐私保护，但面临额外延迟和投毒攻击检测效率低的问题，需平衡安全性与性能。
AI.method: 将监控与检测阶段解耦，利用区块链并行化操作，减少通信、计算及共识延迟。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法提升网络可扩展性、鲁棒性及时间效率，显著降低端到端延迟。
AI.conclusion: 区块链监控机制有效兼顾去中心化联邦学习的安全性与效率，为实际部署提供可行方案。

tldr: 本文提出一种基于区块链的监控技术，用于在去中心化联邦学习中检测投毒攻击，并优化端到端延迟。
motivation: 去中心化联邦学习通过区块链实现隐私保护，但面临额外延迟和投毒攻击检测效率低的问题，需平衡安全性与性能。
method: 将监控与检测阶段解耦，利用区块链并行化操作，减少通信、计算及共识延迟。
result: 实验表明该方法提升网络可扩展性、鲁棒性及时间效率，显著降低端到端延迟。
conclusion: 区块链监控机制有效兼顾去中心化联邦学习的安全性与效率，为实际部署提供可行方案。
search_text: Blockchain-based Monitoring for Poison Attack Detection in Decentralized Federated Learning 基于区块链的去中心化联邦学习中的中毒攻击检测监控 Federated Learning (FL) is a machine learning technique that addresses the privacy challenges in terms of access rights of local datasets by enabling the training of a model across nodes holding their data samples locally. To achieve decentralized federated learning, blockchain-based FL was proposed as a distributed FL architecture. In decentralized FL, the chief is eliminated from the learning process as workers collaborate between each other to train the global model. Decentralized FL applications need to account for the additional delay incurred by blockchain-based FL deployments. Particularly in this setting, to detect targeted/untargeted poisoning attacks, we investigate the end-to-end learning completion latency of a realistic decentralized FL process protected against poisoning attacks. We propose a technique which consists in decoupling the monitoring phase from the detection phase in defenses against poisoning attacks in a decentralized federated learning deployment that aim at monitoring the behavior of the workers. We demonstrate that our proposed blockchain-based monitoring improved network scalability, robustness and time efficiency. The parallelization of operations results in minimized latency over the end-to-end communication, computation, and consensus delays incurred during the FL and blockchain operations. 联邦学习 (FL) 是一种机器学习技术，通过在本地保存数据样本的节点之间进行模型训练，解决本地数据集访问权方面的隐私挑战。为了实现去中心化的联邦学习，基于区块链的 FL 作为分布式 FL 架构被提出。在去中心化 FL 中，由于工作人员之间相互协作来训练全局模型，因此领导者被排除在学习过程之外。去中心化的 FL 应用程序需要考虑基于区块链的 FL 部署所带来的额外延迟。特别是在这种情况下，为了检测有针对性/无针对性的中毒攻击，我们研究了防止中毒攻击的现实去中心化 FL 过程的端到端学习完成延迟。我们提出了一种技术，该技术包括将监控阶段与检测阶段分离，以防御去中心化联合学习部署中的中毒攻击，旨在监控工作人员的行为。我们证明，我们提出的基于区块链的监控提高了网络可扩展性、稳健性和时间效率。操作的并行化可以最大限度地减少 FL 和区块链操作期间发生的端到端通信、计算和共识延迟的延迟。 本文提出一种基于区块链的监控技术，用于在去中心化联邦学习中检测投毒攻击，并优化端到端延迟。 Ranwa Al Mallah,David Lopez cs.CR,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Xue Song,Jingjing Chen,Bin Zhu,Yu-Gang Jiang
title: Text-driven Video Prediction
title_zh: 文本驱动的视频预测
abstract: Current video generation models usually convert signals indicating appearance and motion received from inputs (e.g., image, text) or latent spaces (e.g., noise vectors) into consecutive frames, fulfilling a stochastic generation process for the uncertainty introduced by latent code sampling. However, this generation pattern lacks deterministic constraints for both appearance and motion, leading to uncontrollable and undesirable outcomes. To this end, we propose a new task called Text-driven Video Prediction (TVP). Taking the first frame and text caption as inputs, this task aims to synthesize the following frames. Specifically, appearance and motion components are provided by the image and caption separately. The key to addressing the TVP task depends on fully exploring the underlying motion information in text descriptions, thus facilitating plausible video generation. In fact, this task is intrinsically a cause-and-effect problem, as the text content directly influences the motion changes of frames. To investigate the capability of text in causal inference for progressive motion information, our TVP framework contains a Text Inference Module (TIM), producing step-wise embeddings to regulate motion inference for subsequent frames. In particular, a refinement mechanism incorporating global motion semantics guarantees coherent generation. Extensive experiments are conducted on Something-Something V2 and Single Moving MNIST datasets. Experimental results demonstrate that our model achieves better results over other baselines, verifying the effectiveness of the proposed framework.
summary: Current video generation models usually convert signals indicating appearance and motion received from inputs (e.g., image, text) or latent spaces (e.g., noise vectors) into consecutive frames, fulfilling a stochastic generation process for the uncertainty introduced by latent code sampling. However, this generation pattern lacks deterministic constraints for both appearance and motion, leading to uncontrollable and undesirable outcomes. To this end, we propose a new task called Text-driven Video Prediction (TVP). Taking the first frame and text caption as inputs, this task aims to synthesize the following frames. Specifically, appearance and motion components are provided by the image and caption separately. The key to addressing the TVP task depends on fully exploring the underlying motion information in text descriptions, thus facilitating plausible video generation. In fact, this task is intrinsically a cause-and-effect problem, as the text content directly influences the motion changes of frames. To investigate the capability of text in causal inference for progressive motion information, our TVP framework contains a Text Inference Module (TIM), producing step-wise embeddings to regulate motion inference for subsequent frames. In particular, a refinement mechanism incorporating global motion semantics guarantees coherent generation. Extensive experiments are conducted on Something-Something V2 and Single Moving MNIST datasets. Experimental results demonstrate that our model achieves better results over other baselines, verifying the effectiveness of the proposed framework.
abstract_zh: 当前的视频生成模型通常将从输入（例如图像、文本）或潜在空间（例如噪声向量）接收到的表示外观和运动的信号转换为连续帧，从而实现针对潜在代码采样引入的不确定性的随机生成过程。然而，这种生成模式缺乏对外观和运动的确定性约束，导致不可控和不良的结果。为此，我们提出了一项称为文本驱动视频预测（TVP）的新任务。以第一帧和文本标题作为输入，该任务旨在合成以下帧。具体来说，外观和运动分量分别由图像和标题提供。解决 TVP 任务的关键取决于充分探索文本描述中的底层运动信息，从而促进合理的视频生成。事实上，这个任务本质上是一个因果问题，因为文本内容直接影响帧的运动变化。为了研究文本在渐进运动信息的因果推理中的能力，我们的 TVP 框架包含一个文本推理模块 (TIM)，生成逐步嵌入来调节后续帧的运动推理。特别是，结合全局运动语义的细化机制保证了连贯的生成。在 Something-Something V2 和 Single Moving MNIST 数据集上进行了大量实验。实验结果表明，我们的模型比其他基线取得了更好的结果，验证了所提出框架的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为文本驱动视频预测（TVP）的新任务，通过输入第一帧和文本描述，合成后续视频帧。
AI.motivation: 现有视频生成模型在生成过程中缺乏对视觉和运动的确定性约束，导致生成结果不可控且不符合预期。
AI.method: 提出包含文本推理模块（TIM）的框架，通过提取文本中的运动信息生成逐步嵌入向量，并结合全局运动语义的优化机制保证生成连贯性。
AI.result: 在Something-Something V2和Single Moving MNIST数据集上的实验表明，该模型优于其他基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 文本驱动视频预测框架通过因果推理机制有效提升了视频生成的可控性和合理性。

authors_text: Seanie Lee,Minki Kang,Juho Lee,Sung Ju Hwang,Kenji Kawaguchi
title: Self-Distillation for Further Pre-training of Transformers
title_zh: 用于变压器进一步预训练的自蒸馏
abstract: Pre-training a large transformer model on a massive amount of unlabeled data and fine-tuning it on labeled datasets for diverse downstream tasks has proven to be a successful strategy, for a variety of vision and natural language processing tasks. However, direct fine-tuning of the pre-trained model may be suboptimal if there exist large discrepancies across data domains for pre-training and fine-tuning. To tackle this issue, several previous studies have proposed further pre-training strategies, where we continue to pre-train the model on the target unlabeled dataset before fine-tuning. However, all of them solely focus on language models and we empirically find that a Vision Transformer is vulnerable to overfitting as we continue to pretrain the model on target unlabeled data. In order to tackle this limitation, we propose self-distillation as a regularization for a further pre-training stage. Specifically, we first further pre-train the initial pre-trained model on the target unlabeled data and then consider it as a teacher for self-distillation. Then we take the same initial pre-trained model as a student and enforce its hidden representations to be close to those of the teacher while optimizing the student with a masked auto-encoding objective. We empirically validate the efficacy of self-distillation on a variety of benchmark datasets for image and text classification tasks. Experimentally, we show that our proposed method outperforms all the relevant baselines. Theoretically, we analyze the proposed method with a simplified model to understand how self-distillation for further pre-training can potentially help improve the performance of the downstream tasks.
summary: Pre-training a large transformer model on a massive amount of unlabeled data and fine-tuning it on labeled datasets for diverse downstream tasks has proven to be a successful strategy, for a variety of vision and natural language processing tasks. However, direct fine-tuning of the pre-trained model may be suboptimal if there exist large discrepancies across data domains for pre-training and fine-tuning. To tackle this issue, several previous studies have proposed further pre-training strategies, where we continue to pre-train the model on the target unlabeled dataset before fine-tuning. However, all of them solely focus on language models and we empirically find that a Vision Transformer is vulnerable to overfitting as we continue to pretrain the model on target unlabeled data. In order to tackle this limitation, we propose self-distillation as a regularization for a further pre-training stage. Specifically, we first further pre-train the initial pre-trained model on the target unlabeled data and then consider it as a teacher for self-distillation. Then we take the same initial pre-trained model as a student and enforce its hidden representations to be close to those of the teacher while optimizing the student with a masked auto-encoding objective. We empirically validate the efficacy of self-distillation on a variety of benchmark datasets for image and text classification tasks. Experimentally, we show that our proposed method outperforms all the relevant baselines. Theoretically, we analyze the proposed method with a simplified model to understand how self-distillation for further pre-training can potentially help improve the performance of the downstream tasks.
abstract_zh: 对于各种视觉和自然语言处理任务来说，在大量未标记数据上预训练大型 Transformer 模型并在标记数据集上对其进行微调以实现不同的下游任务已被证明是一种成功的策略。然而，如果预训练和微调的数据域之间存在较大差异，则直接微调预训练模型可能不是最佳的。为了解决这个问题，之前的几项研究提出了进一步的预训练策略，我们在微调之前继续在目标未标记数据集上预训练模型。然而，它们都只关注语言模型，我们根据经验发现，当我们继续在目标未标记数据上对模型进行预训练时，Vision Transformer 很容易过度拟合。为了解决这个限制，我们提出自蒸馏作为进一步预训练阶段的正则化。具体来说，我们首先在目标未标记数据上进一步预训练初始预训练模型，然后将其视为自我蒸馏的老师。然后，我们采用与学生相同的初始预训练模型，并强制其隐藏表示接近教师的隐藏表示，同时使用屏蔽自动编码目标优化学生。我们凭经验验证了自蒸馏在图像和文本分类任务的各种基准数据集上的有效性。通过实验，我们表明我们提出的方法优于所有相关基线。理论上，我们用简化模型分析所提出的方法，以了解进一步预训练的自蒸馏如何可能有助于提高下游任务的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种自蒸馏方法，用于改进Transformer模型的进一步预训练，特别是在视觉任务中防止过拟合。
AI.motivation: 直接微调预训练模型在领域差异较大的情况下效果不佳，而现有进一步预训练方法在视觉Transformer上易导致过拟合，需新的正则化策略。
AI.method: 先在目标未标记数据上进一步预训练模型作为教师，再以原始预训练模型为学生，通过对齐隐藏表示并结合掩码自编码目标进行自蒸馏。
AI.result: 在图像和文本分类基准测试中，该方法优于所有相关基线，理论分析也验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: 自蒸馏能有效提升下游任务性能，通过防止过拟合增强视觉Transformer的泛化能力。

We empirically validate the efficacy of self-distillation on a variety of benchmark datasets for image and text classification tasks. Experimentally, we show that our proposed method outperforms all the relevant baselines. Theoretically, we analyze the proposed method with a simplified model to understand how self-distillation for further pre-training can potentially help improve the performance of the downstream tasks. 对于各种视觉和自然语言处理任务来说，在大量未标记数据上预训练大型 Transformer 模型并在标记数据集上对其进行微调以实现不同的下游任务已被证明是一种成功的策略。然而，如果预训练和微调的数据域之间存在较大差异，则直接微调预训练模型可能不是最佳的。为了解决这个问题，之前的几项研究提出了进一步的预训练策略，我们在微调之前继续在目标未标记数据集上预训练模型。然而，它们都只关注语言模型，我们根据经验发现，当我们继续在目标未标记数据上对模型进行预训练时，Vision Transformer 很容易过度拟合。为了解决这个限制，我们提出自蒸馏作为进一步预训练阶段的正则化。具体来说，我们首先在目标未标记数据上进一步预训练初始预训练模型，然后将其视为自我蒸馏的老师。然后，我们采用与学生相同的初始预训练模型，并强制其隐藏表示接近教师的隐藏表示，同时使用屏蔽自动编码目标优化学生。我们凭经验验证了自蒸馏在图像和文本分类任务的各种基准数据集上的有效性。通过实验，我们表明我们提出的方法优于所有相关基线。理论上，我们用简化模型分析所提出的方法，以了解进一步预训练的自蒸馏如何可能有助于提高下游任务的性能。 本文提出了一种自蒸馏方法，用于改进Transformer模型的进一步预训练，特别是在视觉任务中防止过拟合。 Seanie Lee,Minki Kang,Juho Lee,Sung Ju Hwang,Kenji Kawaguchi cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Robin Magnet,Jing Ren,Olga Sorkine-Hornung,Maks Ovsjanikov
title: Smooth Non-Rigid Shape Matching via Effective Dirichlet Energy Optimization
title_zh: 通过有效的狄利克雷能量优化实现平滑的非刚性形状匹配
comment: Main Manuscript: 10 pages, 5 Figures, 3 Tables // Supplementary: 4 pages, 3 Figures, 5 Tables
comments: Main Manuscript: 10 pages, 5 Figures, 3 Tables // Supplementary: 4 pages, 3 Figures, 5 Tables
abstract: We introduce pointwise map smoothness via the Dirichlet energy into the functional map pipeline, and propose an algorithm for optimizing it efficiently, which leads to high-quality results in challenging settings. Specifically, we first formulate the Dirichlet energy of the pulled-back shape coordinates, as a way to evaluate smoothness of a pointwise map across discrete surfaces. We then extend the recently proposed discrete solver and show how a strategy based on auxiliary variable reformulation allows us to optimize pointwise map smoothness alongside desirable functional map properties such as bijectivity. This leads to an efficient map refinement strategy that simultaneously improves functional and point-to-point correspondences, obtaining smooth maps even on non-isometric shape pairs. Moreover, we demonstrate that several previously proposed methods for computing smooth maps can be reformulated as variants of our approach, which allows us to compare different formulations in a consistent framework. Finally, we compare these methods both on existing benchmarks and on a new rich dataset that we introduce, which contains non-rigid, non-isometric shape pairs with inter-category and cross-category correspondences. Our work leads to a general framework for optimizing and analyzing map smoothness both conceptually and in challenging practical settings.
summary: We introduce pointwise map smoothness via the Dirichlet energy into the functional map pipeline, and propose an algorithm for optimizing it efficiently, which leads to high-quality results in challenging settings. Specifically, we first formulate the Dirichlet energy of the pulled-back shape coordinates, as a way to evaluate smoothness of a pointwise map across discrete surfaces. We then extend the recently proposed discrete solver and show how a strategy based on auxiliary variable reformulation allows us to optimize pointwise map smoothness alongside desirable functional map properties such as bijectivity. This leads to an efficient map refinement strategy that simultaneously improves functional and point-to-point correspondences, obtaining smooth maps even on non-isometric shape pairs. Moreover, we demonstrate that several previously proposed methods for computing smooth maps can be reformulated as variants of our approach, which allows us to compare different formulations in a consistent framework. Finally, we compare these methods both on existing benchmarks and on a new rich dataset that we introduce, which contains non-rigid, non-isometric shape pairs with inter-category and cross-category correspondences. Our work leads to a general framework for optimizing and analyzing map smoothness both conceptually and in challenging practical settings.
abstract_zh: 我们通过狄利克雷能量将点状地图平滑度引入到功能地图管道中，并提出了一种有效优化它的算法，从而在具有挑战性的设置中获得高质量的结果。具体来说，我们首先制定回拉形状坐标的狄利克雷能量，作为评估离散表面上的点式映射的平滑度的一种方法。然后，我们扩展了最近提出的离散求解器，并展示了基于辅助变量重构的策略如何使我们能够优化点图平滑度以及所需的功能图属性（例如双射性）。这导致了一种有效的地图细化策略，可以同时改进功能和点对点对应关系，即使在非等距形状对上也能获得平滑的地图。此外，我们证明了之前提出的几种计算平滑图的方法可以重新表述为我们方法的变体，这使我们能够在一致的框架中比较不同的表述。最后，我们在现有基准和我们引入的新的丰富数据集上比较这些方法，该数据集包含具有类别间和跨类别对应关系的非刚性、非等距形状对。我们的工作形成了一个通用框架，用于从概念上和具有挑战性的实际环境中优化和分析地图平滑度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过有效优化狄利克雷能量来实现非刚性形状的光滑匹配。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理非等距形状配准时难以兼顾映射光滑性与双射性，需改进优化框架以提升匹配质量。
AI.method: 将狄利克雷能量引入函数映射流程，通过辅助变量重构策略同步优化点对点映射光滑性与函数映射双射性，并提出高效优化算法。
AI.result: 在非等距形状数据集上实现高质量光滑映射，涵盖跨类与同类对应关系，且可统一比较多种光滑映射方法。
AI.conclusion: 提出通用框架在理论与实践中有效优化映射光滑性，为非刚性形状匹配提供新思路。

authors_text: Chinmaya Mishra,Gabriel Skantze
title: Knowing Where to Look: A Planning-based Architecture to Automate the Gaze Behavior of Social Robots
title_zh: 知道往哪里看：基于规划的架构来自动化社交机器人的注视行为
comment: accepted for publication in the 31st IEEE International Conference on Robot & Human Interactive Communication (RO-MAN 2022)
comments: accepted for publication in the 31st IEEE International Conference on Robot & Human Interactive Communication (RO-MAN 2022)
abstract: Gaze cues play an important role in human communication and are used to coordinate turn-taking and joint attention, as well as to regulate intimacy. In order to have fluent conversations with people, social robots need to exhibit human-like gaze behavior. Previous Gaze Control Systems (GCS) in HRI have automated robot gaze using data-driven or heuristic approaches. However, these systems tend to be mainly reactive in nature. Planning the robot gaze ahead of time could help in achieving more realistic gaze behavior and better eye-head coordination. In this paper, we propose and implement a novel planning-based GCS. We evaluate our system in a comparative within-subjects user study (N=26) between a reactive system and our proposed system. The results show that the users preferred the proposed system and that it was significantly more interpretable and better at regulating intimacy.
summary: Gaze cues play an important role in human communication and are used to coordinate turn-taking and joint attention, as well as to regulate intimacy. In order to have fluent conversations with people, social robots need to exhibit human-like gaze behavior. Previous Gaze Control Systems (GCS) in HRI have automated robot gaze using data-driven or heuristic approaches. However, these systems tend to be mainly reactive in nature. Planning the robot gaze ahead of time could help in achieving more realistic gaze behavior and better eye-head coordination. In this paper, we propose and implement a novel planning-based GCS. We evaluate our system in a comparative within-subjects user study (N=26) between a reactive system and our proposed system. The results show that the users preferred the proposed system and that it was significantly more interpretable and better at regulating intimacy.
abstract_zh: 目光线索在人类交流中发挥着重要作用，用于协调轮流和共同注意力，以及调节亲密关系。为了与人进行流畅的对话，社交机器人需要表现出类似人类的注视行为。 HRI 中以前的注视控制系统 (GCS) 使用数据驱动或启发式方法实现机器人注视自动化。然而，这些系统本质上往往主要是反应性的。提前规划机器人的注视有助于实现更真实的注视行为和更好的眼头协调。在本文中，我们提出并实现了一种新颖的基于规划的 GCS。我们通过反应系统和我们提出的系统之间的受试者内用户比较研究（N = 26）来评估我们的系统。结果表明，用户更喜欢所提出的系统，并且它的可解释性明显更高，并且能够更好地调节亲密关系。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于规划的视线控制系统，以自动化社交机器人的视线行为，提升其与人类互动的自然度和协调性。
AI.motivation: 现有社交机器人视线控制系统多为反应式，难以实现类似人类的视线规划与眼-头协调，影响交互真实感和亲密感调节。
AI.method: 设计并实现基于规划的新型视线控制系统，通过对比用户研究（N=26）与传统反应式系统进行性能评估。
AI.result: 用户显著偏好新系统，其在可解释性与亲密感调节方面表现优于传统方法。
AI.conclusion: 规划式视线控制系统能有效提升社交机器人视线行为的自然性与交互质量，优于传统反应式方法。

authors_text: Shanshan Zhong,Jinghui Qin,Zhongzhan Huang,Daifeng Li
title: Causal Inference for Chatting Handoff
title_zh: 聊天切换的因果推断
abstract: Aiming to ensure chatbot quality by predicting chatbot failure and enabling human-agent collaboration, Machine-Human Chatting Handoff (MHCH) has attracted lots of attention from both industry and academia in recent years. However, most existing methods mainly focus on the dialogue context or assist with global satisfaction prediction based on multi-task learning, which ignore the grounded relationships among the causal variables, like the user state and labor cost. These variables are significantly associated with handoff decisions, resulting in prediction bias and cost increasement. Therefore, we propose Causal-Enhance Module (CEM) by establishing the causal graph of MHCH based on these two variables, which is a simple yet effective module and can be easy to plug into the existing MHCH methods. For the impact of users, we use the user state to correct the prediction bias according to the causal relationship of multi-task. For the labor cost, we train an auxiliary cost simulator to calculate unbiased labor cost through counterfactual learning so that a model becomes cost-aware. Extensive experiments conducted on four real-world benchmarks demonstrate the effectiveness of CEM in generally improving the performance of existing MHCH methods without any elaborated model crafting.
summary: Aiming to ensure chatbot quality by predicting chatbot failure and enabling human-agent collaboration, Machine-Human Chatting Handoff (MHCH) has attracted lots of attention from both industry and academia in recent years. However, most existing methods mainly focus on the dialogue context or assist with global satisfaction prediction based on multi-task learning, which ignore the grounded relationships among the causal variables, like the user state and labor cost. These variables are significantly associated with handoff decisions, resulting in prediction bias and cost increasement. Therefore, we propose Causal-Enhance Module (CEM) by establishing the causal graph of MHCH based on these two variables, which is a simple yet effective module and can be easy to plug into the existing MHCH methods. For the impact of users, we use the user state to correct the prediction bias according to the causal relationship of multi-task. For the labor cost, we train an auxiliary cost simulator to calculate unbiased labor cost through counterfactual learning so that a model becomes cost-aware. Extensive experiments conducted on four real-world benchmarks demonstrate the effectiveness of CEM in generally improving the performance of existing MHCH methods without any elaborated model crafting.
abstract_zh: 机器与人聊天切换（MHCH）旨在通过预测聊天机器人故障并实现人机协作来确保聊天机器人质量，近年来引起了工业界和学术界的广泛关注。然而，大多数现有方法主要关注对话上下文或基于多任务学习辅助全局满意度预测，而忽略了因果变量之间的基础关系，例如用户状态和劳动力成本。这些变量与切换决策显着相关，导致预测偏差和成本增加。因此，我们提出了因果增强模块（CEM），通过基于这两个变量建立 MHCH 的因果图，这是一个简单而有效的模块，可以很容易地插入现有的 MHCH 方法中。对于用户的影响，我们根据多任务的因果关系，利用用户状态来纠正预测偏差。对于劳动力成本，我们训练一个辅助成本模拟器，通过反事实学习来计算无偏差的劳动力成本，使模型具有成本意识。在四个现实世界基准上进行的大量实验证明了 CEM 在总体上提高现有 MHCH 方法性能的有效性，而无需任何精心设计的模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于因果推理的机器-人工聊天交接（MHCH）方法，通过建立因果图来改进现有方法的预测偏差和成本问题。
AI.motivation: 现有MHCH方法主要依赖对话上下文或多任务学习预测用户满意度，但忽略了用户状态和人力成本等因果变量之间的关联，导致预测偏差和成本增加。
AI.method: 提出因果增强模块（CEM），构建基于用户状态和人力成本的因果图。通过多任务因果关系校正用户状态偏差，并利用反事实学习训练辅助成本模拟器以计算无偏人力成本。
AI.result: 在四个真实数据集上的实验表明，CEM能有效提升现有MHCH方法的性能，且无需复杂模型调整。
AI.conclusion: 通过引入因果推理，CEM能够更准确地捕捉关键变量间的因果关系，从而提升聊天交接决策的质量与效率。

search_text: Causal Inference for Chatting Handoff 聊天切换的因果推断 Aiming to ensure chatbot quality by predicting chatbot failure and enabling human-agent collaboration, Machine-Human Chatting Handoff (MHCH) has attracted lots of attention from both industry and academia in recent years. However, most existing methods mainly focus on the dialogue context or assist with global satisfaction prediction based on multi-task learning, which ignore the grounded relationships among the causal variables, like the user state and labor cost. These variables are significantly associated with handoff decisions, resulting in prediction bias and cost increasement. Therefore, we propose Causal-Enhance Module (CEM) by establishing the causal graph of MHCH based on these two variables, which is a simple yet effective module and can be easy to plug into the existing MHCH methods. For the impact of users, we use the user state to correct the prediction bias according to the causal relationship of multi-task. For the labor cost, we train an auxiliary cost simulator to calculate unbiased labor cost through counterfactual learning so that a model becomes cost-aware. Extensive experiments conducted on four real-world benchmarks demonstrate the effectiveness of CEM in generally improving the performance of existing MHCH methods without any elaborated model crafting. 机器与人聊天切换（MHCH）旨在通过预测聊天机器人故障并实现人机协作来确保聊天机器人质量，近年来引起了工业界和学术界的广泛关注。然而，大多数现有方法主要关注对话上下文或基于多任务学习辅助全局满意度预测，而忽略了因果变量之间的基础关系，例如用户状态和劳动力成本。这些变量与切换决策显着相关，导致预测偏差和成本增加。因此，我们提出了因果增强模块（CEM），通过基于这两个变量建立 MHCH 的因果图，这是一个简单而有效的模块，可以很容易地插入现有的 MHCH 方法中。对于用户的影响，我们根据多任务的因果关系，利用用户状态来纠正预测偏差。对于劳动力成本，我们训练一个辅助成本模拟器，通过反事实学习来计算无偏差的劳动力成本，使模型具有成本意识。在四个现实世界基准上进行的大量实验证明了 CEM 在总体上提高现有 MHCH 方法性能的有效性，而无需任何精心设计的模型。 本文提出了一种基于因果推理的机器-人工聊天交接（MHCH）方法，通过建立因果图来改进现有方法的预测偏差和成本问题。 Shanshan Zhong,Jinghui Qin,Zhongzhan Huang,Daifeng Li cs.AI,cs.CL,cs.LG

authors_text: Runmin Cong,Qinwei Lin,Chen Zhang,Chongyi Li,Xiaochun Cao,Qingming Huang,Yao Zhao
title: CIR-Net: Cross-modality Interaction and Refinement for RGB-D Salient Object Detection
title_zh: CIR-Net：RGB-D 显着目标检测的跨模态交互和细化
comment: Accepted by IEEE Transactions on Image Processing 2022, 16 pages, 11 figures
comments: Accepted by IEEE Transactions on Image Processing 2022, 16 pages, 11 figures
abstract: Focusing on the issue of how to effectively capture and utilize cross-modality information in RGB-D salient object detection (SOD) task, we present a convolutional neural network (CNN) model, named CIR-Net, based on the novel cross-modality interaction and refinement. For the cross-modality interaction, 1) a progressive attention guided integration unit is proposed to sufficiently integrate RGB-D feature representations in the encoder stage, and 2) a convergence aggregation structure is proposed, which flows the RGB and depth decoding features into the corresponding RGB-D decoding streams via an importance gated fusion unit in the decoder stage. For the cross-modality refinement, we insert a refinement middleware structure between the encoder and the decoder, in which the RGB, depth, and RGB-D encoder features are further refined by successively using a self-modality attention refinement unit and a cross-modality weighting refinement unit. At last, with the gradually refined features, we predict the saliency map in the decoder stage. Extensive experiments on six popular RGB-D SOD benchmarks demonstrate that our network outperforms the state-of-the-art saliency detectors both qualitatively and quantitatively.
summary: Focusing on the issue of how to effectively capture and utilize cross-modality information in RGB-D salient object detection (SOD) task, we present a convolutional neural network (CNN) model, named CIR-Net, based on the novel cross-modality interaction and refinement. For the cross-modality interaction, 1) a progressive attention guided integration unit is proposed to sufficiently integrate RGB-D feature representations in the encoder stage, and 2) a convergence aggregation structure is proposed, which flows the RGB and depth decoding features into the corresponding RGB-D decoding streams via an importance gated fusion unit in the decoder stage. For the cross-modality refinement, we insert a refinement middleware structure between the encoder and the decoder, in which the RGB, depth, and RGB-D encoder features are further refined by successively using a self-modality attention refinement unit and a cross-modality weighting refinement unit. At last, with the gradually refined features, we predict the saliency map in the decoder stage. Extensive experiments on six popular RGB-D SOD benchmarks demonstrate that our network outperforms the state-of-the-art saliency detectors both qualitatively and quantitatively.
abstract_zh: 针对如何在 RGB-D 显着目标检测（SOD）任务中有效捕获和利用跨模态信息的问题，我们提出了一种基于新颖的跨模态交互和细化的卷积神经网络（CNN）模型，命名为 CIR-Net。对于跨模态交互，1）提出了渐进式注意力引导集成单元，以在编码器阶段充分集成 RGB-D 特征表示，2）提出了收敛聚合结构，该结构通过解码器阶段的重要性门控融合单元将 RGB 和深度解码特征流入相应的 RGB-D 解码流。对于跨模态细化，我们在编码器和解码器之间插入一个细化中间件结构，其中通过连续使用自模态注意细化单元和跨模态加权细化单元来进一步细化RGB、深度和RGB-D编码器特征。最后，随着特征的逐渐细化，我们在解码器阶段预测显着图。对六个流行的 RGB-D SOD 基准进行的大量实验表明，我们的网络在定性和定量上都优于最先进的显着性检测器。

AI.tldr: 本文提出CIR-Net网络，通过跨模态交互与 refinement 技术提升RGB-D显著性目标检测性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法未能充分挖掘RGB与深度信息的跨模态关联，导致特征表达不充分，影响检测精度。
AI.method: 设计渐进式注意力引导融合单元实现编码阶段RGB-D特征交互，解码阶段采用收敛聚合结构传递特征。在编码解码间插入 refinement 中间层，通过自模态注意力和跨模态加权单元迭代优化特征。
AI.result: 在六个主流RGB-D显著性检测数据集上均超越现有最优方法，定性定量结果均表现优异。
AI.conclusion: 跨模态交互与分阶段 refinement 机制有效提升了RGB-D特征融合能力，为显著性检测提供新思路。

authors_text: Rizwan Hamid Randhawa,Nauman Aslam,Mohammad Alauthman,Muhammad Khalid,Husnain Rafiq
title: Deep Reinforcement Learning based Evasion Generative Adversarial Network for Botnet Detection
title_zh: 用于僵尸网络检测的基于深度强化学习的规避生成对抗网络
abstract: Botnet detectors based on machine learning are potential targets for adversarial evasion attacks. Several research works employ adversarial training with samples generated from generative adversarial nets (GANs) to make the botnet detectors adept at recognising adversarial evasions. However, the synthetic evasions may not follow the original semantics of the input samples. This paper proposes a novel GAN model leveraged with deep reinforcement learning (DRL) to explore semantic aware samples and simultaneously harden its detection. A DRL agent is used to attack the discriminator of the GAN that acts as a botnet detector. The discriminator is trained on the crafted perturbations by the agent during the GAN training, which helps the GAN generator converge earlier than the case without DRL. We name this model RELEVAGAN, i.e. ["relive a GAN" or deep REinforcement Learning-based Evasion Generative Adversarial Network] because, with the help of DRL, it minimises the GAN's job by letting its generator explore the evasion samples within the semantic limits. During the GAN training, the attacks are conducted to adjust the discriminator weights for learning crafted perturbations by the agent. RELEVAGAN does not require adversarial training for the ML classifiers since it can act as an adversarial semantic-aware botnet detection model. Code will be available at https://github.com/rhr407/RELEVAGAN.
summary: Botnet detectors based on machine learning are potential targets for adversarial evasion attacks. Several research works employ adversarial training with samples generated from generative adversarial nets (GANs) to make the botnet detectors adept at recognising adversarial evasions. However, the synthetic evasions may not follow the original semantics of the input samples. This paper proposes a novel GAN model leveraged with deep reinforcement learning (DRL) to explore semantic aware samples and simultaneously harden its detection. A DRL agent is used to attack the discriminator of the GAN that acts as a botnet detector. The discriminator is trained on the crafted perturbations by the agent during the GAN training, which helps the GAN generator converge earlier than the case without DRL. We name this model RELEVAGAN, i.e. ["relive a GAN" or deep REinforcement Learning-based Evasion Generative Adversarial Network] because, with the help of DRL, it minimises the GAN's job by letting its generator explore the evasion samples within the semantic limits. During the GAN training, the attacks are conducted to adjust the discriminator weights for learning crafted perturbations by the agent. RELEVAGAN does not require adversarial training for the ML classifiers since it can act as an adversarial semantic-aware botnet detection model. Code will be available at https://github.com/rhr407/RELEVAGAN.
abstract_zh: 基于机器学习的僵尸网络检测器是对抗性规避攻击的潜在目标。一些研究工作利用生成对抗网络（GAN）生成的样本进行对抗训练，使僵尸网络检测器擅长识别对抗规避。然而，合成规避可能不遵循输入样本的原始语义。本文提出了一种利用深度强化学习 (DRL) 的新型 GAN 模型来探索语义感知样本并同时强化其检测。 DRL 代理用于攻击充当僵尸网络检测器的 GAN 的鉴别器。判别器在 GAN 训练期间接受智能体精心设计的扰动的训练，这有助于 GAN 生成器比没有 DRL 的情况更早收敛。我们将这个模型命名为 RELEVAGAN，即“重温 GAN”或基于深度强化学习的规避生成对抗网络]，因为在 DRL 的帮助下，它通过让生成器在语义限制内探索规避样本来最大限度地减少 GAN 的工作。在 GAN 训练期间，进行攻击是为了调整鉴别器权重，以学习代理精心设计的扰动。 RELEVAGAN 不需要对 ML 分类器进行对抗性训练，因为它可以充当对抗性语义感知僵尸网络检测模型。代码可在 https://github.com/rhr407/RELEVAGAN 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合深度强化学习（DRL）的生成对抗网络（RELEVAGAN），用于生成语义感知的僵尸网络规避样本，以增强检测器的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有GAN生成的对抗样本可能偏离原始语义，导致检测器失效，需设计能生成语义合理规避样本并强化检测的方法。
AI.method: 通过DRL代理攻击GAN判别器（作为检测器），在训练中动态调整判别器权重，引导生成器在语义约束下生成有效规避样本。
AI.result: RELEVAGAN使生成器更快收敛，生成符合语义的规避样本，且无需额外对抗训练即可提升检测器鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: RELEVAGAN通过DRL与GAN的协同，实现了语义感知的规避样本生成与检测强化，为对抗性攻击防御提供了新思路。

ai_content.motivation: 现有GAN生成的对抗样本可能偏离原始语义，导致检测器失效，需设计能生成语义合理规避样本并强化检测的方法。
ai_content.method: 通过DRL代理攻击GAN判别器（作为检测器），在训练中动态调整判别器权重，引导生成器在语义约束下生成有效规避样本。
ai_content.result: RELEVAGAN使生成器更快收敛，生成符合语义的规避样本，且无需额外对抗训练即可提升检测器鲁棒性。
ai_content.conclusion: RELEVAGAN通过DRL与GAN的协同，实现了语义感知的规避样本生成与检测强化，为对抗性攻击防御提供了新思路。

ai_content_json.method: 通过DRL代理攻击GAN判别器（作为检测器），在训练中动态调整判别器权重，引导生成器在语义约束下生成有效规避样本。
ai_content_json.result: RELEVAGAN使生成器更快收敛，生成符合语义的规避样本，且无需额外对抗训练即可提升检测器鲁棒性。

tldr: 本文提出一种结合深度强化学习（DRL）的生成对抗网络（RELEVAGAN），用于生成语义感知的僵尸网络规避样本，以增强检测器的鲁棒性。
motivation: 现有GAN生成的对抗样本可能偏离原始语义，导致检测器失效，需设计能生成语义合理规避样本并强化检测的方法。
method: 通过DRL代理攻击GAN判别器（作为检测器），在训练中动态调整判别器权重，引导生成器在语义约束下生成有效规避样本。
result: RELEVAGAN使生成器更快收敛，生成符合语义的规避样本，且无需额外对抗训练即可提升检测器鲁棒性。
conclusion: RELEVAGAN通过DRL与GAN的协同，实现了语义感知的规避样本生成与检测强化，为对抗性攻击防御提供了新思路。
search_text: Deep Reinforcement Learning based Evasion Generative Adversarial Network for Botnet Detection 用于僵尸网络检测的基于深度强化学习的规避生成对抗网络 Botnet detectors based on machine learning are potential targets for adversarial evasion attacks. Several research works employ adversarial training with samples generated from generative adversarial nets (GANs) to make the botnet detectors adept at recognising adversarial evasions. However, the synthetic evasions may not follow the original semantics of the input samples. This paper proposes a novel GAN model leveraged with deep reinforcement learning (DRL) to explore semantic aware samples and simultaneously harden its detection. A DRL agent is used to attack the discriminator of the GAN that acts as a botnet detector. The discriminator is trained on the crafted perturbations by the agent during the GAN training, which helps the GAN generator converge earlier than the case without DRL. We name this model RELEVAGAN, i.e. ["relive a GAN" or deep REinforcement Learning-based Evasion Generative Adversarial Network] because, with the help of DRL, it minimises the GAN's job by letting its generator explore the evasion samples within the semantic limits. During the GAN training, the attacks are conducted to adjust the discriminator weights for learning crafted perturbations by the agent. RELEVAGAN does not require adversarial training for the ML classifiers since it can act as an adversarial semantic-aware botnet detection model. Code will be available at https://github.com/rhr407/RELEVAGAN. 基于机器学习的僵尸网络检测器是对抗性规避攻击的潜在目标。一些研究工作利用生成对抗网络（GAN）生成的样本进行对抗训练，使僵尸网络检测器擅长识别对抗规避。然而，合成规避可能不遵循输入样本的原始语义。本文提出了一种利用深度强化学习 (DRL) 的新型 GAN 模型来探索语义感知样本并同时强化其检测。 DRL 代理用于攻击充当僵尸网络检测器的 GAN 的鉴别器。判别器在 GAN 训练期间接受智能体精心设计的扰动的训练，这有助于 GAN 生成器比没有 DRL 的情况更早收敛。我们将这个模型命名为 RELEVAGAN，即“重温 GAN”或基于深度强化学习的规避生成对抗网络]，因为在 DRL 的帮助下，它通过让生成器在语义限制内探索规避样本来最大限度地减少 GAN 的工作。在 GAN 训练期间，进行攻击是为了调整鉴别器权重，以学习代理精心设计的扰动。 RELEVAGAN 不需要对 ML 分类器进行对抗性训练，因为它可以充当对抗性语义感知僵尸网络检测模型。代码可在 https://github.com/rhr407/RELEVAGAN 获取。 本文提出一种结合深度强化学习（DRL）的生成对抗网络（RELEVAGAN），用于生成语义感知的僵尸网络规避样本，以增强检测器的鲁棒性。 Rizwan Hamid Randhawa,Nauman Aslam,Mohammad Alauthman,Muhammad Khalid,Husnain Rafiq cs.CR,cs.AI
